caption:
Constant fatigue is one of the most common, and overlooked, signs that your health may be off balance. The reason isn’t always obvious, but your blood work can explain why.

Six key biomarkers, including cortisol, testosterone, CRP, vitamin D, HbA1c, and iron, can reveal why your energy is chronically low and what steps to take next.

Uncover the silent signals your body’s been trying to tell you.
hookLine: Constant fatigue is one of the most common, and overlooked, signs that your health may be off balance. The reason isn’t always obvious, but your blood work can explain why.

Composição: sujeito ocupa terço direito superior, cabeça cortada no topo; grande negativo no terço esquerdo para respiro tipográfico; fundo é parede lisa com gradiente sage→âmbar; foreground sem objetos. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top center, fonte SF Pro Display, Medium, #FFFFFF, tracking +20, line-height 100%, tamanho sm. 2) “6 Biomarkers Can Tell You Why You’re Waking Up Groggy” — mid-center levemente acima do meio, Inter Regular, #FFFFFF, tracking +10, line-height 120%, tamanho lg; quebra em 2 linhas equilibradas. 3) “Know the feeling all too well?” — bottom-center, Inter Regular, #FFFFFF, tracking +10, line-height 120%, tamanho md. Sob todos os textos, scrim sutil linear preto #000000 a 18% de opacidade, 20px de padding ótico (sem caixas visíveis). Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone; apenas vignette radial suave para contraste de leitura. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, onírico, sofisticado. Não criar aparência de IA. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post. Cinematic editorial close-up portrait at eye level: a young, fair-skinned person with medium platinum-blond hair, gaze down-left, contemplative, with artistic motion blur conveying morning fatigue. Lighting: warm right-side key at 45°, 4200K medium; soft left fill 10% at 5200K; subtle amber rim 15%; soft shadows, cool-green bias. Palette: sage-gray #8CA099 → pale moss #C9D2C7 in shadows; peach #EAC39A → amber #D79A57 → sepia #5A4338 in highlights; lifted blacks #1B1B1B; text off-white #F5F7F8. Film grading: lifted blacks, low contrast, cyan shadows, warm halation. Texture: 35mm grain 5%, directional motion blur 25–30% (1/10s), gentle bloom, organic vignette -10%, cine diffusion. primary.artDirection: Paleta: verde‑sálvia #8CA099 e musgo pálido #C9D2C7 nas sombras; pêssego #EAC39A, âmbar #D79A57 e sépia #5A4338 nos highlights; pretos levantados #1B1B1B; textos #F5F7F8. ■ HBA1C
If your blood sugar is often too high, like with prediabetes or diabetes, your body struggles to use that sugar for energy, leaving you feeling tired. Plus, your body has to work extra hard to handle high blood sugar, which wears you out. A low blood sugar also makes you feel weak and dizzy.

slides.subject: Iron's role in the body and iron deficiency anemia
slides.textOverlay:
- IRON
Iron is an important mineral that transports
oxygen all around your body. It's a big part of
hemoglobin, a protein in red blood cells that
carries oxygen from oxygen from your lungs to your
tissues.

When your iron levels drop too low, your
body struggles to make enough healthy red
blood cells. This leads to a condition known
as iron deficiency anemia. A common sign
of this is feeling really tired or weak.

caption:
Can stress really change your biology?
The answer is yes and the hormone at the center of it is cortisol.

When balanced, cortisol helps regulate energy, sleep, blood sugar, and recovery. But when it’s chronically high, it can drive weight gain, anxiety, cravings, poor sleep, and even accelerate aging.

Subtle cortisol changes often happens years before bigger health problems appear so it’s important to track your levels and optimize your stress response before symptoms spiral later on.
hookLine: Can stress really change your biology?

slides.subject: Cortisol hormone, its functions, and effects of imbalance
slides.textOverlay:
Cortisol is your body's main stress hormone, released by the adrenal glands. It helps regulates blood sugar & metabolism, inflammation & immune response, and even how your body stores fat.

Healthy cortisol naturally rises in the morning (to wake you up) and lowers at night (to help you sleep).

Small, daily fluctuations are normal. But chronic imbalance can disrupt nearly every system.
slides.style: Modern, clean, biological illustration, digital

Place clean, white sans-serif text on the left side, explaining cortisol's role.

slides.composition: The slide features a central glowing point from which abstract, organic, vein-like structures radiate outwards. White text is overlaid on the left and center, divided into two main bulleted lists.
slides.subject: Symptoms of cortisol imbalance (too high and too low)
slides.textOverlay:
Cortisol is too high:
1 Increased cravings (sugar/carbs)
2 Anxiety, irritability, or brain fog
3 Abdominal weight gain
4 Poor sleep
5 Suppressed immune system
6 Slow recovery

Cortisol is too low:
1 Constant fatigue
2 Low motivation or depression
3 Dizziness/lightheadedness
4 Low blood pressure

slides.subject: The systemic effects of chronic stress and elevated cortisol on the human body, leading to accelerated biological aging.
slides.textOverlay:
When stress never lets up, cortisol stays elevated and the effects ripple through your body:

1 Metabolic: insulin resistance, diabetes risk

2 Cardiovascular: hypertension, heart disease

3 Cognitive: memory issues, brain aging

4 Hormonal: disrupted thyroid, sex hormones, cycles

5 Immune: higher inflammation, slower healing

Chronic imbalance accelerates your biological aging.

slides.subject: Cortisol levels and their impact on health, including 'fight or flight' mode, metabolism, hormones, and early disease warnings.
slides.textOverlay:
Cortisol shifts often show up years before disease. Tracking your levels can reveal:

1 If your body is stuck in “fight or flight” mode
Chronic stress keeps cortisol elevated even when the trigger is gone, straining your nervous system.

2 How stress is impacting your metabolism, energy, and hormones
High cortisol drives belly fat, cravings, and hormone imbalances that ripple through your thyroid, insulin, and reproductive systems.

3 Early warning signs of burnout or metabolic disease
Long before diabetes, heart disease, or adrenal fatigue appear, cortisol patterns flag underlying stress on your body.

slides.composition: A numbered list of five points providing practical advice, with a main title. The text is left-aligned over an abstract, organic background.
slides.subject: Cortisol optimization and stress management tips
slides.textOverlay:
Optimize Your Cortisol By:
1 Prioritize quality sleep & consistent routines
Go to bed/wake up at the same time, reduce late-night screen exposure, and create a wind-down ritual
2 Eat whole foods + protein
Frequent spikes and crashes push cortisol higher. Focus on fiber, protein, and slow carbs to balance your blood sugar.
3 Regular exercise
Moderate strength + cardio lowers stress hormones. Excessive high-intensity can do the opposite.
4 Stress reduction practices
Daily breathwork, meditation, journaling, or time outdoors help reset your nervous system.
5 Test and track
Monitoring cortisol levels over time shows whether lifestyle changes are working and catches hidden imbalances early.

Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo extra; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não criar aparência de IA/plástico; Não aplicar drop shadows na tipografia. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp nas áreas de pele, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial beauty close-up, slight high angle (~15°), showing the right side profile of a serene woman, eyes closed, with a large crisp shadow of her face cast on a textured wall to the left. Lighting: hard key at 45° from camera-right, 3600–3800K, high intensity with specular skin; near-zero fill (1:6); faint rim from background 4200K. Palette: parchment #E8D8C8; deep teal shadow #2D4956; skin peach #F2C7A6 → caramel #B8755D → terracotta #8C4C3E; off-white text #F4F2EC; speckles #C9A889. Film grade: slightly lifted blacks, soft S-curve, −0.2 EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 8–10%, subtle halation, organic vignette −0.3. Composition: rule-of-thirds; face on right third, chin near lower third; large left-side shadow as negative space for type; shallow DOF. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/2.8, ISO 200, 1/200s, tripod. Overlays: “Mito” top-left (SF Pro Text Medium, #F4F2EC, sm); “Just ten\nminutes” center-left stacked (Canela Regular, #F4F2EC, xl); “& you can finally be\nfree from ...” bottom-right (Canela Regular, #F4F2EC, md). No icons, just 6% safe margins and fine noise overlay. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote minimal type; Aesop product minimal; Calvin Klein editorial; Equinox campaign. Avoid saturated colors, generic medical icons, AI-ish plastic skin, or drop shadows.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: base papel cru #E8D8C8 com manchas #C9A889; sombra teal #2D4956; pele pêssego #F2C7A6 a caramelo #B8755D; tipografia em off‑white #F4F2EC. Tipografia: wordmark pequeno “Mito” em SF Pro Text Medium; títulos e frases em Canela Regular (ou Georgia/Times como fallback), tracking neutro, line-height compacto. Hierarquia: título "Just ten minutes" em xl, empilhado; apoio “& you can finally be free from ...” em md no canto inferior direito. Três anti‑padrões críticos: sem ícones ou pictogramas médicos; sem saturação vibrante; sem sombras artificiais na tipografia (nem glow). Referências: Apple keynote (espaço em branco e clareza), Aesop (minimalismo texturizado). Vibe: luxo wellness científico—pele real com brilho saudável, sombra gráfica bold, composição minimal e contemplativa que parece anúncio de fragrância, porém com mensagem health-tech.

primary.hookSignal: O headline serifado gigantesco “Win the New iPhone 17 Pro” em branco puro no negativo preto prende instantaneamente o olhar. Em seguida, o brilho cobre do módulo de câmeras no canto inferior cria contraste luxuoso que reforça o stop‑scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando composição premium de dois smartphones sobre fundo preto profundo com headline serifada em branco no topo. Sujeito principal: dois smartphones premium; o traseiro em alumínio cobre acetinado (canto superior com trio de lentes grandes) e o frontal exibindo a UI do app Mito Health (dashboard de Biological age), sem mãos, estética clean e luxo tech. Iluminação: key light soft 45° à esquerda, 5200K, intensidade 70%; fill 25% à direita 5400K; rim light sutil 10% por trás para recorte metálico; sombras macias, sem hotspots; polarizer para controlar reflexos. Paleta: preto antracite #0E0F10; branco puro #FFFFFF; cinza texto #B7BDC6; cobre metálico #D9722F → âmbar #C46028; aço polido #E5E7EB; UI off-white #F9FAFB; verde card #1FAE78 → #3BC38E; acento azul #3A8DFF. Grading: contraste S-curve suave, blacks verdadeiros, midtones levemente levantados, lifted blacks +5, highlights controlados. Textura/tratamento: superfícies metálicas glossy, film grain 35mm 3%, vignette -10, micro-bloom 2% nas highlights, nitidez alta. Composição: rule-of-thirds; metade superior é negative space com tipografia; metade inferior mostra os aparelhos sobrepostos: o traseiro ocupa bottom-left, rotacionado +4°; o frontal centralizado ligeiramente à direita, sobrepondo 40% o traseiro; margem de segurança 6% nas bordas. Camera position context: captura em estúdio, como se por tripé alto, 85mm f/5.6, ISO 100, shutter 1/125, DOF média para ambos nítidos. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “[GIVEAWAY CLOSED]” em top-center, Inter Medium, cor #B7BDC6 com capsule borda #2A2B2E, tracking +4, tamanho sm; 2) “Mito” top-center acima do título, SF Pro Display Medium, #FFFFFF, size sm; 3) “Win the New iPhone 17 Pro” center-top, New York Serif Bold, #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 1.1, size xl; 4) “Next-generation tech meets next-generation health.” mid-top center, SF Pro Text Regular, #B7BDC6, size md. Na tela do telefone: “Mito” top-left, SF Pro Display Semibold #0B0D0E; pill “Give $50, get $50” top-right, cápsula #111214 com texto #FFFFFF (size xs); badge “Latest results” mid-right, cápsula #FFFFFF com ícone ponto azul #3A8DFF e texto #1E293B; título “Your health” top-left #0B0D0E; card verde “Biological age” com gauge branco 2px; número “15” center, SF Pro Display Bold #FFFFFF size lg; subtítulo “6.3 years younger” abaixo em #E6FFF4 80%; parágrafo em #E6FFF4 70%; botão “Share” capsule #EEF2F7 com ícone share #475569. Elementos gráficos: notch preto superior; lentes com anéis metálicos; sombras soft drop 12px #000000 30% sob os devices. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, clínico, aspiracional, high-tech. Referências: Apple Keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Anti-padrões: não usar neon saturado; não aplicar sombras duras; não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; não adicionar reflexos especulares exagerados; não incluir mãos/mockups. Style summary: realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, edges sharp, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial product shot from a high overhead angle, showing two premium smartphones on deep black. Main subject: copper satin aluminum phone (rear, triple lenses) overlapped by a front-facing phone with the Mito Health app (Biological age card). Lighting: soft key 45° left 5200K 70%, fill 25% right 5400K, subtle rim 10% from behind; soft shadows, controlled highlights. Palette: black #0E0F10, white #FFFFFF, gray #B7BDC6, copper #D9722F → #C46028, steel #E5E7EB, UI off-white #F9FAFB, green #1FAE78 → #3BC38E, accent blue #3A8DFF. Treatment: 35mm grain 3%, mild vignette, slight bloom 2%, crisp edges. Composition: top half negative space for typography; bottom half devices overlapped (rear bottom-left rotated +4°, front slightly right of center). Camera: studio tripod, 85mm, f/5.6, ISO100, 1/125, medium DOF. Overlays: “[GIVEAWAY CLOSED]” small capsule top-center (#B7BDC6, border #2A2B2E); “Mito” small above; headline “Win the New iPhone 17 Pro” large serif; subhead “Next-generation tech meets next-generation health.” medium gray center. On-screen UI: “Mito” top-left; pill “Give $50, get $50” black #111214; badge “Latest results” white with blue dot #3A8DFF; title “Your health”; green card with white arc; number “15” large white; “6.3 years younger”; body copy; “Share” button #EEF2F7. Mood: clean, premium, clinical, tech-luxury. References: Apple Keynote, Aesop. Keep realistic, minimal, high-res.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: preto antracite #0E0F10 como base; branco #FFFFFF para tipografia principal; cinza #B7BDC6 para subhead; cobre #D9722F → #C46028 nos metais; UI em off‑white #F9FAFB com verde #1FAE78 → #3BC38E e azul de acento #3A8DFF. Tipografia: headline em New York Serif Bold (ou Georgia Bold), branco #FFFFFF; subhead e microcopy em SF Pro Text/Display Regular–Medium, cinza #B7BDC6; badge “[GIVEAWAY CLOSED]” em Inter Medium, cinza #B7BDC6 dentro de cápsula com borda #2A2B2E. Layout: metade superior para tipografia alinhada ao centro; metade inferior com dois devices sobrepostos (traseiro cobre ligeiro ângulo; frontal central mostrando a tela do app Mito). Três anti‑padrões críticos: evitar cores neon/oversaturated; não usar sombras duras ou glow artificial; não inserir ícones médicos clichê (estetoscópio, cruz). Referências: Apple Keynote (hierarquia tipográfica e negative space) e Aesop (minimalismo e materialidade premium). Vibe geral: luxo científico e clínico, tech de próxima geração com serenidade editorial.

caption:
Having abnormally high testosterone levels without TRT is something worth paying attention to, but also not talked about much. 

We mostly hear about low testosterone tracing back to fatigue, low drive, and mood dips. But high testosterone can be just as concerning as it increases your risk of prostate cancer, stroke, infertility, and other high-risk conditions.

Therefore, it’s worthwhile to check up on your symptoms of irritability, sleep issues, acne and see if it traces back to high testosterone levels which is only traceable through bloodwork.
hookLine: Having abnormally high testosterone levels without TRT is something worth paying attention to, but also not talked about much.

Sujeito principal: homem ciclista anônimo, ~35 anos, capacete preto fosco, óculos esportivos envolventes, jersey de ciclismo bege texturizado, mãos firmes no guidão; expressão neutra, corpo parcialmente borrado pelo motion blur, narrativa de performance e biomarcadores fora da curva. 3. Iluminação: golden hour filtrada por folhagem, key light suave lateral esquerda a 5200K, fill natural ambiente 30%, rim light quente no contorno do capacete; sombras orgânicas médias, contraste moderado. 4. Paleta: verde-escuro da mata #0F2A1F → verde denso #1E4738 → bege jersey #C6AD91 → pele pêssego #F2C7A4 → preto carvão #0B0C0D → branco off #F6F7F8; film grading com shadows ligeiramente teal #1B3E3A, highlights quentes; blacks levantados em 8%. 5. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, leve subexposição -0.2EV, blur de movimento orgânico (sem artefatos IA), vignette suave -10, nitidez seletiva nos óculos/guia do guidão. 6. Composição: rule-of-thirds; ciclista ocupa o terço esquerdo-médio; fundo de árvores em streaks diagonais à direita; guidão cruza a base; grande área negativa no terço inferior para tipografia; logo pequeno no topo-esquerda; label técnico no topo-direita. 7. Camera position context: mirrorless full-frame, 50mm f/2.0, 1/15s com panning esquerdo→direito, ISO 100, polarizer leve; distância curta para close dinâmico; proporção 4:5. 8. Texto/overlays: "Mito" (top-left, SF Pro Display Bold, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +2%, tamanho sm); "HERE'S THE SCIENCE" (top-right, SF Mono Regular, #E6ECE9, tracking +6%, tamanho xs); "Testosterone is high. But not on TRT?" (bottom-center, Inter Medium, branco #FFFFFF, line-height 1.1, tracking +1%, tamanho xl; destaque "TRT" em Inter Bold). 9. Elementos gráficos: gradiente linear preto #000000 45% → 0% do bottom 30% para cima; safe margins de 64px invisíveis; sem boxes, sem ícones; micro grão overlay 3% para unificar tipografia ao fundo. 10. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, atlético, científico, enérgico, sofisticado, minimal. 11. Referências: Apple keynote slide (hierarquia tipográfica), Equinox campaign (atletismo de luxo), Rapha editorial (estética cycling). 12. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores vibrantes/neon; Não aplicar drop shadows pesadas em texto; Não usar ícones médicos genéricos; Não centralizar tudo; Não congelar o movimento (manter motion blur elegante). 13. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, sharp seletivo, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo with side panning, chest-height angle, showing a moving cyclist on a tree-lined road. Subject: anonymous male cyclist ~35, matte black helmet, wraparound shades, beige textured jersey, firm hands on bars; body motion-blurred for performance narrative. Lighting: golden hour through foliage, soft key left at 5200K, ambient fill 30%, warm rim; medium natural shadows. Palette: #0F2A1F → #1E4738 greens, jersey beige #C6AD91, skin peach #F2C7A4, charcoal #0B0C0D, off-white #F6F7F8; teal shadows #1B3E3A, warm highlights, lifted blacks 8%. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, -0.2EV, organic motion blur, subtle vignette, selective sharpness on glasses/bar. Composition: rule-of-thirds; rider left-mid, streaked forest right, handlebar across bottom, negative space for type; small logo top-left, technical label top-right. Camera: full-frame 50mm f/2, 1/15s panning L→R, ISO100, polarizer. Overlays: "Mito" top-left (SF Pro Display Bold, #FFFFFF, sm), "HERE'S THE SCIENCE" top-right (SF Mono Regular, #E6ECE9, xs), "Testosterone is high. But not on TRT?" bottom-center (Inter Medium, #FFFFFF, xl; "TRT" Bold). Graphics: bottom 30% black gradient #000 45%→0, invisible 64px safe margins. primary.artDirection: Recrie um close dinâmico de ciclista com panning e motion blur elegante. Tipografia: headline Inter Medium/Bold em branco (tracking +1%, LH 1.1), label técnico SF Mono Regular em #E6ECE9 (tracking +6%), marca "Mito" em SF Pro Display Bold branco pequeno. Aplique gradiente preto 45% no bottom 30% para legibilidade, grain 35mm 5%, subexposição leve. Três anti-padrões críticos: sem neon/saturação alta; sem drop shadows pesadas; sem ícones médicos genéricos. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia limpa) e Equinox campaign (luxo atlético); como terceira inspiração, Rapha editorial para autenticidade do ciclismo. Vibe geral em 1 frase: ciência de performance premium apresentada com energia contida, minimalista e sofisticada.

slides.subject: The risks associated with high testosterone levels, challenging the common misconception that only low levels are problematic, and suggesting potential underlying health issues.
slides.textOverlay:
Mito
HIGH TESTOSTERONE RISKS
SHOULDN'T I ONLY WORRY IF MY TESTOSTERONE LEVELS ARE LOW?
Low testosterone gets most of the attention, but high testosterone can be just as concerning. Elevated levels are often a sign that something deeper is going on, like thyroid dysfunction, adrenal or testicular tumors, or hormone resistance.
So no. High testosterone isn't always a win. It's your body signaling that something deserves a closer look.

caption:
The school year is a marathon for parents, so make sure you’re not running on empty.

This back-to-school season, check off the easiest assignment you’ll ever have: a 10-minute blood draw giving you 100+ insights into your health

Because when you feel your best, you can show up for every science fair, spelling bee test, and late-night project.

Your homework: take care of you.
hookLine: The school year is a marathon for parents, so make sure you’re not running on empty.

Back To School, Back To You
You make sure they're ready for school...
but what about you?

primary.hookSignal: O contraste do título serifado “Back To School, Back To You” em branco #F2F2F2, perfeitamente nítido e central no topo, contra o fundo com motion blur da criança correndo, cria um stop‑scroll imediato. O texto estático ‘paira’ sobre a cena quente de golden hour, destacando-se do bosque escuro.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de trás, ângulo levemente alto, mostrando uma criança de 6–8 anos com cabelos castanho‑claro médios, correndo com braços abertos num campo, cabelo e vestido esvoaçando em motion blur, sugerindo energia do back-to-school. Iluminação golden hour com rim light suave vindo de trás‑lado direito, key light natural difusa, 4800K, intensidade média, sombras longas e macias caindo à esquerda. Paleta: verde‑floresta #0E1B12 → olive #6F7754 → sage #9CAA7B no gramado; bege‑areia do vestido #C8BA9A; pele quente #D9B79B; tipografia branca #F2F2F2; vignette escuro #0B0B0B a 20%. Grading: look Kodak Portra 400, levemente subexposto (-0,2), blacks lift 8%, contraste baixo‑médio. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, motion blur de panning ~25px, leve bloom no highlight do cabelo, blur cinematográfico orgânico no fundo. Composição: regra dos terços; linha do bosque ocupando o terço superior escuro; sujeito central‑esquerda no terço inferior; grande negative space no topo para headline; fundo homogêneo desfocado (bokeh suave) separando sujeito. Camera position context: full‑frame 50mm f/2.0, 1/60s, ISO 100, panning acompanhando a criança; handheld estável. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) "Back To School,\nBack To You" — posição top‑center; fonte Times New Roman; peso Semibold; cor #F2F2F2; tracking +2; line-height 110%; tamanho xl; sem animação; quebra de linha após vírgula. 2) "You make sure they’re ready for school...\nbut what about you?" — posição bottom‑third center; fonte SF Pro Text; peso Regular; cor #F2F2F2 com sombra #000000 a 25% blur 6; tracking 0; line-height 120%; tamanho md. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone, nenhum box, sem logo; apenas vignette suave radial 20% para legibilidade. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, nostálgico, caloroso, humano, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia clara sobre fundo escuro suave), Aesop minimal (paleta terrosa), Calvin Klein editorial (motion blur elegante), Equinox campaign (energia atlética refinada). Anti‑padrões: Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não adicionar logo; Não inserir ícones médicos; Não usar sombras duras; Não criar aparência de IA. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nítido no texto, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo from behind, slightly high angle, a 6–8yo child with medium light‑brown hair running with arms wide across a field, dress and hair in motion blur. Golden hour rim light from back‑right, soft natural key, 4800K, medium intensity, long soft shadows. Palette: forest #0E1B12, olive #6F7754, sage #9CAA7B grass; sand‑beige dress #C8BA9A; warm skin #D9B79B; type #F2F2F2; vignette #0B0B0B 20%. Film grade: Kodak Portra‑style, slightly underexposed (‑0.2), lifted blacks 8%, low‑medium contrast. Texture: 35mm grain 5%, panning motion blur ~25px, gentle highlight bloom, organic cinematic blur. Composition: rule‑of‑thirds; dark tree line top third; subject center‑left bottom third; generous top negative space for headline; smooth bokeh background. Camera: full‑frame 50mm f/2.0, 1/60s, ISO100, handheld panning. Overlays: 1) "Back To School,\nBack To You" top‑center, Times New Roman Semibold, #F2F2F2, tracking +2, LH 110%, size XL. 2) "You make sure they’re ready for school...\nbut what about you?" bottom‑third center, SF Pro Text Regular, #F2F2F2 with #000000 25% shadow blur 6, LH 120%, size M. No icons, no logo; subtle radial vignette. Mood: clean, premium, nostalgic, contemplative. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal; Calvin Klein editorial; Equinox energy. Keep realistic, minimal, high‑res.
primary.artDirection: Paleta terrosa e premium: verde‑floresta #0E1B12, olive #6F7754, sage #9CAA7B, areia #C8BA9A, pele quente #D9B79B, tipografia branca #F2F2F2, vignette #0B0B0B 20%. Iluminação golden hour 4800K com rim light atrás‑direita. Grading Kodak Portra‑like, -0,2 EV, blacks lift 8%, contraste baixo‑médio. Tipografia: headline em Times New Roman Semibold branco (#F2F2F2), tracking +2, line-height 110%, quebra em duas linhas; subcopy em SF Pro Text Regular (#F2F2F2) com sombra #000000 25% blur 6, line-height 120%. Anti‑padrões críticos: evitar logos/selos; não usar cores saturadas ou gradients chamativos; não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; sem filtros artificiais que “gritam IA”. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica clara) e Aesop (minimalismo terroso). Vibe geral: editorial premium e calor humano — energia infantil em blur versus copy nítida convidando o pai/mãe para priorizar a própria saúde.

slides.subject: Parental self-care and the importance of taking time for oneself amidst the demands of raising children. The visual elements symbolize a busy life but also a yearning for freedom and personal well-being.
slides.textOverlay:
✓ Drink water (not just coffee)
✓ Take 5 minutes to breathe
✓ Eat something green that's not your kid's leftover broccoli
✓ Go to your yoga class
You make sure your kid stays on top of their homework.
But what about your own?
Theirs is math. Yours is your health.

Because when you feel your best, they get the best of you.

caption:
Introducing the Gut Microbiome Test, the most comprehensive dive into the 120,000+ microbes shaping your digestion, mood, immunity, and metabolism.

We’re partnering with @tiny.health to bring you the gold standard in microbiome science: advanced shotgun metagenomic sequencing. This technology identifies microbes at the strain level, giving you a far more detailed and actionable view of your gut than traditional methods.

The gut impacts nearly every system in your body. Knowing what’s living in your gut can help you uncover:

• 120,000+ microbe insights (bacteria, parasites, fungi)
• Beneficial vs. disruptive microbes
• Inflammation-related bacteria
• Microbiome diversity
• Genetic predispositions

Paired with our Core 100+ biomarkers bloodwork, it’s the most complete picture of your health yet.
hookLine: Introducing the Gut Microbiome Test, the most comprehensive dive into the 120,000+ microbes shaping your digestion, mood, immunity, and metabolism.

primary.hookSignal: O retângulo inferior com bactérias pixeladas em coral #FF6C5C e roxo #8A43D6, em forte contraste contra o slate escuro #1E2A2C, corta as bordas do quadro e dispara o stop-scroll. A linha “Launching Microbiome Insights” em verde #47D18C imediatamente ancora o olhar logo acima do painel.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, editorial minimalista premium, vista ortográfica frontal (ângulo 90°), mostrando um slide clean de lançamento de produto health-tech. Sujeito principal: layout tipográfico da marca Mito Health em fundo slate-escuro com um quadro inferior de micrografia estilizada (bactérias em forma de cápsula) em dithering coral→roxo, narrativa de “introducing test” séria e científica. Iluminação: simulação de softbox difuso, 5600K, intensidade baixa, sem hotspots; contraste suave, sombras quase inexistentes para sensação flat. Paleta: fundo slate profundo #1E2A2C; branco suave do texto #ECF2F2; cinza de apoio #9AA7AD; hairlines #5E6B6F; acento sage/teal #47D18C; quadro interno mais escuro #182326; bactérias coral #FF6C5C com dithering magenta/roxo #8A43D6 sobre pontos azuis #3D3BF0; borda do quadro #A4B0B5. Grading: blacks levemente lifted, -0.1 EV, sem saturação exagerada. Textura/tratamento: papel fosco sutil, grain 2–3%, dithering pontilhado nas bactérias (halftone 35%), nitidez alta no texto. Composição: margem generosa; logotipo “Mito” no canto superior direito; bloco de headline alinhado à esquerda ocupando o terço superior; duas hairlines horizontais finíssimas separando título/sub e o callout verde; rodapé visual com um retângulo centrado (80% largura, 48% altura do bottom-half) contendo as formas bacterianas parcialmente cortadas nos cantos. Camera position context: captura como poster flat lay, 50mm equivalente, sem distorção, zero shallow DOF. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” (top-right, Inter SemiBold, peso Medium, cor #ECF2F2, tracking 0, line-height 100%, tamanho md). 2) “Gut Microbiome Test” (top-left, Times New Roman SemiBold, Bold, #ECF2F2, tracking -1%, line-height 110%, tamanho xl). 3) “Your health decoded. To the next level.” (abaixo do título, left, Inter Regular, #9AA7AD, tracking 0, line-height 120%, tamanho md). 4) Hairline 1px #5E6B6F acima e abaixo do subtítulo (full-width do bloco). 5) “Launching Microbiome Insights” (bottom-third left, Inter Medium, #47D18C, tracking 0, line-height 110%, tamanho md). 6) “Powered by:” (à esquerda do logo-parceiro, baseline com a linha verde, Inter Regular, #9AA7AD, sm). 7) “tiny health” (após “Powered by:”, Inter SemiBold, #ECF2F2, sm). Elementos gráficos: quadro inferior com borda 1px #A4B0B5; dentro, 5 formas ovais orgânicas coral #FF6C5C com dithering roxo #8A43D6, cortadas nas bordas superior direita, inferior direita e inferior esquerda; fundo do quadro #182326. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, meticuloso, sofisticado, calmo. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product layout. Anti-padrões: Não usar ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar sombras pesadas/gloss; Não usar cores neon saturadas; Não adicionar texturas 3D; Não quebrar margens. Style summary: Manter realismo gráfico, tipografia nítida, hairlines precisas, grão sutil, alta resolução, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram slide, premium minimal editorial, orthographic front view (90°). Dark slate background #1E2A2C with left-aligned headline block and a framed microbiology panel at the bottom. Lighting: softbox-like, 5600K, low intensity, flat contrast, almost no shadows. Palette: text white #ECF2F2, support gray #9AA7AD, hairlines #5E6B6F, accent sage/teal #47D18C, inner panel bg #182326, bacteria coral #FF6C5C with purple dithering #8A43D6 and blue dots #3D3BF0, frame border #A4B0B5. Slightly lifted blacks, -0.1 EV. Texture: matte paper, 2–3% film grain, crisp type, halftone bacteria. Composition: generous margins; “Mito” top-right; “Gut Microbiome Test” top-left (Times New Roman Bold, xl); subline below (Inter Regular, gray); hairlines 1px above/below subline; “Launching Microbiome Insights” in green (Inter Medium) with “Powered by: tiny health” small. Bottom panel centered (80% width, ~48% of lower half) containing 5 cropped pill-shaped bacteria in coral/purple dithering on dark bg. Camera: poster flat lay, 50mm equiv, zero DOF. Mood: clean, scientific, luxurious, calm. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop product minimal. Avoid: neon colors, heavy shadows/gloss, generic medical icons. Keep high-res, precise hairlines, subtle grain.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: fundo slate #1E2A2C; texto principal #ECF2F2; apoio #9AA7AD; hairlines #5E6B6F; acento #47D18C; quadro #182326; bactérias coral #FF6C5C com dithering roxo #8A43D6 e pontos azuis #3D3BF0; borda do quadro #A4B0B5. Tipografia: título em Times New Roman Bold (ou Lora SemiBold), branco #ECF2F2; subtítulo e metadados em Inter Regular/Medium, cinza #9AA7AD; callout em Inter Medium verde #47D18C; “Mito” no canto superior direito em Inter SemiBold branco. Hierarquia: headline xl; sub md; callout md; powered-by sm. Layout: margens amplas; duas hairlines 1px; painel microbiológico centralizado no bottom-half (80% largura). Anti-padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos clichê, não aplicar sombras pesadas ou gradientes glossy, não saturar as cores além dos hex definidos. Referências: Apple keynote (clareza, grids, respiro) e Aesop (minimalismo textural, sofisticação). Vibe geral: ciência premium silenciosa, precisão editorial com um toque de arte de dados.

caption:
Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?
This may be more than just stress and aging. It could be the early signs of Vitamin B12 deficiency.

Even with the healthiest diet, you could still be deficient. The cause is because absorption declines as you age, especially after your 30s.

That’s why early symptoms look subtle: fatigue, brain fog, restless sleep. But over time, deficiency increases risks for long-term damages to your health.

It’s one of the most correctable deficiencies - if you catch it early. Measuring your B12 levels reveals whether your body is truly absorbing it and also how to fix your diet or supplementation so you do it right.
hookLine: Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?

primary.hookSignal: O contraste do título serifado gigante “Vitamin B12” em branco puro no centro-inferior contra o fundo âmbar com condensação cria um foco instantâneo. Logo abaixo, a pergunta direta “Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?” atravessando o terço médio dispara o stop-scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica frontal, close-up macro, straight-on, mostrando um vidro embaçado com condensação e bokeh orgânico dourado ao fundo, com tipografia clean sobreposta. Sujeito principal: superfície de vidro úmida coberta por microgotas nítidas; fundo desfocado sugere plantas e luz de fim de tarde; narrativa de clarity vs. brain fog. Iluminação: key light difusa atrás do vidro (backlight) simulando golden hour, 4200–4500 K, intensidade média-alta; fill suave frontal 10% para dar legibilidade ao texto; rim especular nas gotículas; sombras macias no terço inferior. Paleta: âmbar mel #D9A441 → ocre #C58C2B no topo; transição para verde-oliva #233527 e verde-floresta profundo #0E1B14 na base; brancos #F4F6F7 para tipografia; linha sutil #D9D9D9 a 60%; grading filmic com blacks levemente lifted e realce quente. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6–8%, micro-contraste nas gotas, halation discreto nas altas, leve haze; subexposição -0.2 EV. Composição: regra dos terços; topo limpo para logotipo; título “Vitamin B12” ocupa centro-inferior (slightly left); a pergunta “Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?” cruza o terço médio; copy curto no bottom-right com divisor fino que estende à direita; foreground = gotas nítidas; background = bokeh orgânico suave. Camera position context: 100mm macro f/2.8, shallow DOF, ISO 200, 1/125s, tripé; como capturada em estúdio com backplate botânico desfocado. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top center, SF Pro Display Medium, branco #F4F6F7, tracking +20, line-height 100%, tamanho sm, sem animação. 2) “Vitamin B12” — bottom-middle left, serif Canela Regular (fallback Georgia), peso Regular, branco #F4F6F7, tracking 0, LH 100%, tamanho xl. 3) “Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?” — mid-center, Inter Regular, branco #F4F6F7 a 92% opacidade, tracking +10, LH 120%, tamanho md. 4) “The essential nutrient your cells rely on for energy, mood, and memory.” — bottom-right, Inter Medium, branco #F4F6F7 a 85%, tracking +5, LH 140%, tamanho sm; divisor: linha 1px #D9D9D9/60% estendendo 120px à direita. Elementos gráficos: apenas a linha divisória horizontal descrita. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal product. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores neon/saturadas; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar drop shadows pesadas na tipografia; Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp nas gotas, composição minimalista e sofisticada.

TEXT/OVERLAYS — 1) “Mito” top-center, SF Pro Display Medium, white #F4F6F7, tracking +20, size sm. 2) “Vitamin B12” bottom-middle left, Canela Regular (Georgia fallback), white, size xl. 3) “Brain fog? Low energy? Struggling to focus?” mid-center, Inter Regular, white 92% opacity, size md. 4) “The essential nutrient your cells rely on for energy, mood, and memory.” bottom-right, Inter Medium, white 85%, size sm; divider 1px #D9D9D9/60% length 120px. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote, Aesop.
primary.artDirection: Fundo fotográfico macro de vidro com condensação; bokeh dourado no topo e verdes escuros na base. Paleta: âmbar #D9A441, ocre #C58C2B, verde-oliva #233527, verde-floresta #0E1B14, tipografia em branco #F4F6F7, divisor #D9D9D9/60%. Tipografia: topo “Mito” em SF Pro Display Medium branco; título “Vitamin B12” em serif Canela Regular (fallback Georgia) branco, grande; pergunta em Inter Regular branco a 92% opacidade; copy final em Inter Medium branco a 85% com linha divisória 1px estendendo à direita. Três anti-padrões críticos: evitar cores neon/saturadas; evitar ícones médicos genéricos (coração, estetoscópio); evitar sombras/degradês na tipografia (manter flat). Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica e respiro), Aesop (organicity minimal e paleta terrosa). Vibe geral em 1 frase: luxury wellness científico, calmo e alto-nível, onde o vidro embaçado simboliza brain fog e a tipografia nítida simboliza clareza.

slides.textOverlay:
Vitamin B12 is a water-soluble vitamin critical for energy metabolism, red blood cell formation, neurological function, and DNA synthesis.

Especially after turning 30, your body's ability to naturally absorb B12 significantly declines which puts you at risk of deficiency without even realizing it.

Unlike other nutrients, your body can't make vitamin B12. Therefore, you must get it from food or supplements – making supplementation key to preventing fatigue, brain fog, and long-term deficiency.

slides.subject: Information about B12 deficiency symptoms and risks, presented as text on an abstract, textured background.
slides.textOverlay:
A B12 deficiency may look like:
1 Fatigue and low energy
2 Muscle weakness
3 Numbness or tingling
4 Cognitive difficulties
5 Gastrointestinal issues

Chronic B12 deficiency may lead
to long-term risks such as:

1 Nerve damage
2 Elevated homocysteine
3 Increased cardiovascular risk
4 Anemia
5 Shortness of breath
6 Impaired energy metabolism

Therefore, early diagnosis and
treatment of a B12 deficiency is
critical to avoid permanent
damage.

slides.textOverlay:
The good news. B12 deficiency is often correctable through fixing your diet and proper supplementation.
Excellent sources of Vitamin B12
1 Beef liver
2 Sardines
3 Salmon
4 Tuna
5 Beef
6 Nutritional yeast
7 Eggs
8 Milk
Incorporating these vitamin B12-rich foods into your diet can help ensure you're getting adequate amounts of this essential nutrient for optimal health.

caption:
Your hormones are the body’s messengers, and estradiol is one of the most powerful. Beyond reproduction and fertility, it influences mood, metabolism, skin, bone health, and even how your brain functions.

When estradiol falls out of balance, the signs often show up in ways we don’t immediately connect: bloating, hot flashes, irregular cycles, mood changes, dry skin. Tracking this hormone can give you answers—and a clearer path toward feeling like yourself again.

At Mito, we measure estradiol alongside 100+ other biomarkers, connecting the dots between your symptoms and what’s happening inside your body. Because understanding your biology is the first step to changing it.

primary.hookSignal: O título “Estradiol” em serif branca gigante no canto superior‑esquerdo contrasta com a macro orgânica pêssego‑sage desfocada, criando um stop‑scroll editorial-científico imediato. O vale luminoso ao centro guia o olho direto para a sequência de perguntas em branco.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando uma macro-paisagem orgânica de tecido celular translúcido que evoca membranas com padrão de favo. Sujeito principal: superfície biológica suave em close extremo, volumes arredondados cor pêssego e verde-sage, com um vale claro central que conduz o olhar; narrativa científica-premium para explicar estradiol. Iluminação: soft backlight difuso vindo do centro‑direita, key a 45° muito suave, fill amplo, temperatura 4700K, intensidade baixa com sombras macias e leve haze atmosférico; pequenos rim highlights nas bordas das células. Paleta: pêssego #F1D3C6 → blush coral #D58E81 → terracotta #B56A5C, contraponto sage #6F8C7A → deep forest #2E473E, brancos quentes #F2F2EE; film grading tipo Kodak Portra 400, -0.2EV, blacks levemente lifted (#1C1C1C), saturação -15%, contraste baixo. Textura/tratamento: microdetalhe orgânico, grain de filme 35mm 8%, halation 6%, bloom sutil, vignette 8%, clarity -10. Composição: regra dos terços; massa clara no terço superior-direito ocupa ~60%; placa escuro‑esverdeada no canto inferior‑esquerdo; corredor luminoso no centro para legibilidade; margens de segurança 10% em todos os lados. Camera position context: 100mm macro f/4, shallow DOF moderado, ISO 200, 1/125s, capturada top‑down em copy-stand. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Estradiol” — top-left, fonte Times New Roman, Weight Bold, cor #F4F3F0 a 92% de opacidade, tracking -1%, line-height 110%, tamanho xl. 2) “Bloating? Hot flashes? Irregular cycles? Moody? Dry skin?” — middle-left sobre o vale claro, fonte Inter, Weight Medium, cor #FFFFFF 88%, tracking 0%, line-height 120%, tamanho lg. 3) “The hormone with impact far beyond just reproduction and fertility” — bottom-center right, fonte Inter, Weight Regular, cor #F0F0EC 90%, tracking 0%, line-height 130%, tamanho md, alinhado à esquerda. ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: regra horizontal fina 1px #E9E9E2 70% de opacidade estendendo-se 18% à direita da terceira linha; nenhum ícone, nenhum logo; leve overlay de gradiente radial translúcido #000000 0→25% apenas para legibilidade no canto inferior. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Calvin Klein editorial; Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo; Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não usar drop shadows pesadas; Não criar aparência de IA/3D neon. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nítido nas bordas principais, composição minimalista e sofisticada.

Composition: rule-of-thirds; large light mass top-right (~60%), darker green plate bottom-left, bright corridor center for text, 10% safe margins. slides.textOverlay:
Estradiol is one of the main forms of estrogen, a key female sex hormone. It helps regulate your menstrual cycle, supports fertility, keeps your bones healthy, and affects your mood.

Estradiol levels in women don't stay the same throughout life. They shift depending on your age, whether you're in your menstrual cycle, or if you're approaching or past menopause.

slides.subject: Explanation of premenopausal, perimenopausal, and postmenopausal stages with details on estradiol levels and associated symptoms/risks.
slides.textOverlay:
Premenopausal Stage
For women with regular periods, estradiol levels naturally rise and fall during follicular phase, ovulation, and luteal phase.
These fluctuations are completely normal, however if levels are too high or too low, it could indicate hormone-related concerns like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) or low ovarian reserve.
Perimenopausal Stage
Hormone levels are typically all over the place. Estrogen levels could instantly drop during this phase which leads to symptoms like hot flashes, mood swings, or irregular periods.
Postmenopausal Stage
You’re considered postmenopausal if you’ve gone a full year without a period. Estradiol levels are expected to drop but critically low levels increases risk of bone thinning, heart disease, and vaginal dryness.

caption:
Not all supplements play nice together. You could be taking the right supplements…but at the wrong time or in wrong doses.

Some compete for absorption. Others cancel each other out or even block benefits entirely.

When it comes to supplements, timing and pairing matter just as much as what you take. Learn how to take them the right way so you actually feel the difference.
hookLine: Not all supplements play nice together. You could be taking the right supplements…but at the wrong time or in wrong doses.

slides.subject: Nutrient interactions and competition for absorption, specifically calcium and magnesium, and iron and zinc.
slides.textOverlay:
NUTRIENTS THAT COMPETE FOR ABSORPTION

Calcium + Magnesium

Often bundled together for bone and muscle health, high doses can cause them to compete in your gut – reducing absorption and counteracting their benefits.

Tip: Split the doses – Take your calcium in the morning and a magnesium supplement at night for sleep and muscle relaxation.

Iron + Zinc

Both are essential minerals, but they share the same absorption pathway. High doses of one can block the other, limiting their benefits.

Tip: Take zinc in the morning and iron later in the day, or use a balanced supplement with the right ratio.

Features two distinct sections: 'Calcium + Magnesium' and 'Iron + Zinc', each with a bold title, descriptive text, and a 'Tip'. A smaller main title 'NUTRIENTS THAT COMPETE FOR ABSORPTION' at the top. Emphasize ample negative space and a modern, health-conscious aesthetic.

slides.subject: The importance of balancing specific nutrient pairs (Vitamin D & K, Zinc & Copper) and their interactions within the body.
slides.textOverlay:
NUTRIENTS THAT NEED TO STAY IN BALANCE

Vitamin D + K

Vitamin D helps your body absorb calcium, while vitamin K2 directs it into your bones and teeth instead of your arteries. Without enough K2, high vitamin D intake – especially with calcium – can contribute to calcium buildup in blood vessels.

Tip: Pair vitamin D3 with K2 for better bone health and to help prevent arterial calcification. Fermented foods like natto and hard cheeses are also natural K2 sources.

Zinc + Copper

Zinc supports immunity and healing, while copper helps make red blood cells and protect against oxidative stress. But they share the same transporter in the gut – too much zinc can block copper absorption, leading to deficiency over time.

Tip: If you take zinc regularly, be sure to get copper too – ideally in a 10:1 or 15:1 zinc-to-copper ratio.

slides.subject: Nutrient interactions and supplement compatibility
slides.textOverlay:
NUTRIENTS THAT INTERFERE WITH FUNCTION

Vitamin C + B12

Vitamin C boosts immunity, while B12 supports nerve health and red blood cell production. But high doses of vitamin C can break down B12, making it harder to absorb.

Tip: Take B12 in the morning and vitamin C later in the day, spacing them at least two hours apart.

Vitamin A + E

Vitamin A is best for good vision, healthy skin, and a strong immune system, while vitamin E protects your cells from oxidative stress. Over supplementing on Vitamin E messes with Vitamin A absorption.

Tip: Stick to moderate doses unless advised by a healthcare professional, and avoid pairing high-dose E with A unless in a balanced formula.

caption:
Not getting enough quality sleep can be frustrating. And people suffering from poor sleep naturally turn to supplements like magnesium to unwind and reset. But not all forms of magnesium work the same way.

Glycinate is best for the restless body.
Threonete is best for the restless mind.

Once you start to match the right magnesium to your sleep type, better nights (and better days) follow.

slides.subject: Different forms of magnesium for sleep and their specific benefits.
slides.textOverlay:
Magnesium regulates over 300 biochemical reactions. One of its core roles is helping calm the nervous system. But not all forms of magnesium work the same way in the body. Some are better absorbed. Others target specific tissues. When it comes to sleep, two types are especially popular:
Magnesium Glycinate
calms the muscles, eases anxiety, and helps you fall (and stay) asleep.
Magnesium Threonate

caption:
What if your “healthy diet” is pushing you into folate overload? Folate is essential as it supports pregnancy health, cell growth, and DNA production. But in today’s world of fortified foods and daily supplements, it’s easy to get more than your body needs. 

That means your morning cereal, daily multivitamins, and even your “healthy” protein bars could be stacking up more folate than your body can use.

Too much folate can:
• Mask a vitamin B12 deficiency 
• Disrupt your immune response
• Increase certain health risks over time

Test your folate levels and fine-tune your diet and supplement routine so your body gets exactly what it needs - no more, no less.

primary.hookSignal: A folha de lótus gigante, translúcida e backlit, com veias radiantes em verde‑oliva no centro do quadro contra o gradiente ocre, cria um contraste orgânico‑luxuoso que para o scroll. O título serifado branco no topo, curto e provocativo, reforça a pausa visual.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica frontal, ângulo médio estático, mostrando uma única folha de lótus translúcida em close, centrada, contra fundo gradiente pêssego‑ocre minimalista. Sujeito principal: folha de lótus vista pelo verso, ~28–32 cm de diâmetro, verde‑claro leitoso #E9F3BE com veias radiais bem definidas em verde oliva #6E9E4B; pecíolo fino vertical #3E7C3C sobe do bottom center e encontra o miolo escuro no centro da lâmina; narrativa: símbolo de “natural/saudável” tensionado pela pergunta sobre excesso de folato. Iluminação: backlight difuso através da folha com softbox 120 cm a 45° atrás e ligeira direita (70%); fill frontal suave 20% com bounce branco; rim light 10% na borda esquerda; Kelvin 4400K (quente neutro), sombras suaves sem hotspots. Paleta: fundo gradiente pêssego #F2C18A → damasco #E7B276 → ocre quente #CD8F5C; folha #E9F3BE, veias #6E9E4B, pecíolo #3E7C3C; tipografia em branco off‑white #F7F6F2. Grading: leve subexposição −0.2, blacks ligeiramente lifted, contraste suave S‑curve, grain de filme 35mm 5%. Textura/tratamento: nitidez alta no sujeito, blur de fundo orgânico, micro‑contraste nas veias, sem banding no gradiente. Composição: regra dos terços; topo com amplo negative space para o título; folha ocupa terço inferior‑central; pecíolo alinhado ao eixo vertical; sem outros objetos. Camera position context: lente macro 105mm f/8, ISO 160, 1/160s, tripod, foco no miolo; shallow DOF moderado isolando fundo. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Folate: How much becomes too much?” — top center; fonte Canela Regular; peso Regular; cor #F7F6F2; tracking +2%; line-height 110%; tamanho lg; sem animação. 2) “Your “healthy diet” could be pushing you into folate overload” — bottom-third center; fonte Inter Regular; peso Medium; cor #F7F6F2; tracking +1%; line-height 120%; tamanho md; sem animação. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone, label ou pill; apenas alinhamento ótico central e margens de 6% nas laterais. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, quiet‑luxury. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product; Kinfolk editorial. Anti‑padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar aparência de IA. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary final: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post. Cinematic editorial photo, frontal, static mid angle: a single translucent lotus leaf centered against a peach–ochre gradient backdrop. Subject: underside of the leaf, ~30 cm, milky light green #E9F3BE with crisp radial veins #6E9E4B; slim stem #3E7C3C rising from bottom center to the core. Lighting: diffused backlight through the leaf (120 cm softbox, 45° back-right, 70%); soft front fill 20%; subtle rim 10% left; 4400K warm-neutral, soft shadows. Palette: background gradient #F2C18A → #E7B276 → #CD8F5C; text off-white #F7F6F2. Grading: slight underexposure −0.2, lifted blacks, gentle S-curve, 35mm film grain 5%. Texture: high sharpness on veins; organic background blur. Composition: rule-of-thirds; generous top negative space for headline; leaf occupies lower-center; stem on vertical axis. Camera: 105mm macro, f/8, ISO160, 1/160s, tripod, focus on node; moderate shallow DOF. Overlays: Top-center headline “Folate: How much becomes too much?” (Canela Regular, lg, #F7F6F2, +2% tracking). Bottom-third center subhead “Your “healthy diet” could be pushing you into folate overload” (Inter Medium, md, #F7F6F2, +1% tracking). Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal product. Avoid logos, saturated neons, generic medical icons, AI-ish artifacts; keep realistic, high-res, minimal.
primary.artDirection: Recrie uma cena botânica minimal contra fundo gradiente pêssego‑ocre (#F2C18A → #E7B276 → #CD8F5C). Folha única de lótus vista pelo verso, verde‑claro #E9F3BE com veias #6E9E4B e pecíolo #3E7C3C, nítida e central. Iluminação: backlight difuso 120 cm a 45° por trás/direita (70%), fill frontal 20%, rim leve à esquerda; 4400K. Tipografia: título em Canela Regular, branco off‑white #F7F6F2, tracking +2%, alinhamento top center; subtítulo em Inter Medium #F7F6F2, tracking +1%, bottom‑third center. Grading suave, blacks levemente levantados, grain 35mm 5%. Três anti‑padrões críticos: evitar logos e selos; não usar cores neon ou saturadas; não inserir ícones médicos genéricos (pílulas, estetoscópio). Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia e respiro) e Aesop (minimalismo tátil). Vibe geral: quiet‑luxury científico — orgânico, clínico e premium, com muito negative space e foco na translucidez da folha.

slides.subject: The negative health implications of excessive folate intake, including masking B12 deficiency and potential cancer risk, emphasizing the importance of nutritional balance.
slides.textOverlay:
Why too much becomes a problem

Getting too much folate can actually work against your health. Excess levels can mask a vitamin B12 deficiency, making it harder to detect and treat early. It may also interfere with your body’s natural immune response, and research has linked chronically high folate intake to an increased risk of certain cancers.

Your body’s balance matters and with nutrients, more isn’t always better.

slides.subject: Recommended daily folate intake and the role of food versus supplements, visually supported by a person holding leafy greens.
slides.textOverlay:
Recommended daily intake:

Adults ~400 mcg DFE/day
Pregnant ~600 mcg DFE/day

DFE = Dietary Folate Equivalents = food + supplements

Most people can hit this through food alone - supplements should only fill the gap, not overflow it.

slides.subject: Folate level assessment, dietary tracking, and personalized health support from Mito.
slides.textOverlay:
The best way to know if your folate is in the optimal range is through blood testing for serum folate and red blood cell (RBC) folate.
From there, look closely at your supplement labels and track how much fortified food you're eating – things like cereals, breads, and energy bars can add up quickly.
Mito can tell you where your folate levels stand and help you fine-tune your diet and supplement routine for optimal health.

caption:
Can stress actually make you live longer?
When done right, yes.

Cold plunges trigger your resilience by boosting dopamine and stress tolerance. Saunas mimic exercise, lowering cardiovascular risk and even reducing all-cause mortality in long-term studies.

This synergistic longevity duo shows how deliberate exposure to heat and cold can improve recovery, protect heart health, and build long-term resilience.
hookLine: Can stress actually make you live longer?

primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial underwater photo, mid-angle slightly upward, featuring a large glassy water bubble just below a calm surface. Main subject: translucent bubble bottom-right with a vertical trail of microbubbles and a soft, unidentifiable human-face reflection inside. Lighting: soft diffused top light through water, 5800K, low–medium intensity, gentle rim on bubble, softened shadows. Palette: aqua mist #B7CCD0 → glacier blue #A3BDC6 → grey-mist #DDE7EA → porcelain white #F6FAFB, faint skin-coral #D57C6E in reflection; cool grading, lifted blacks, slight underexposure (-0.2 EV), smooth highlight roll-off. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, organic sharpness, 2% halation, natural watery blur. Composition: surface line in upper third; ample negative space; bubble occupies ~25% bottom-right; microbubble trail near center; type left-mid and right-mid. Camera: underwater housing with dome port, 100mm macro f/4, 1/1000s, ISO 200, moderate shallow DOF. Overlays: 1) “Mito” left-mid, Inter Medium, #F2F4F5, tracking +8, LH 110%, size sm. 2) “The Synergistic Longevity Duo” left-mid below, Inter Regular, #F2F4F5, tracking +6, LH 120%, size lg. 3) “Cold Plunge & / Sauna Therapy” right-mid, Inter Regular, #F2F4F5, tracking +6, LH 120%, size md. No icons. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. Refs: Apple keynote slide; Aesop; Equinox. Avoid saturated colors, drop shadows, generic medical icons, over-sharpening, AI-looking artifacts.
primary.artDirection: Fotografia subaquática minimalista com grande espaço negativo. Paleta fria e calma: aqua névoa #B7CCD0, glacier blue #A3BDC6, grey-mist #DDE7EA, white-porcelain #F6FAFB, acento coral #D57C6E no reflexo. Tipografia: Inter em toda a peça — “Mito” Inter Medium branco #F2F4F5 (tracking +8); título principal Inter Regular branco #F2F4F5 (tracking +6, leading 120%); bloco direito Inter Regular branco #F2F4F5 (mesmas métricas). Grid 12 col, margens 7%. Alinhar “Mito” e título à esquerda, bloco “Cold Plunge & / Sauna Therapy” à direita, ambos no eixo médio vertical, mantendo a bolha no terço inferior-direito. Foto: 100mm macro f/4, 1/1000, ISO 200; luz difusa 5800K de cima; grading frio com blacks lifted e -0,2 EV; grain 35mm 5% e halation 2%. Três anti-padrões críticos: sem cores saturadas, sem ícones/ornamentos, sem sombras projetadas em textos. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia e respiro) e Aesop (minimalismo táctil). Vibe geral: luxo científico-calmo, aquático e contemplativo.

slides.subject: Benefits of cold plunges and saunas for health and longevity
slides.textOverlay:
Cold plunge and saunas aren’t just wellness trends. They’ve been used for centuries to boost health and recovery. Science now confirms their benefits:
Cold Plunges improve mood, reduce inflammation, and support sleep.
Saunas are linked to better heart health, lower cholesterol, and stronger immunity.
Together, this hot-cold combination enhances cardiovascular function, relieves stress, improves sleep quality, and may even support longevity when practiced consistently.
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, textual, modern
slides.prompt: Minimalist Instagram carousel slide with a clean light grey background (#F0F2F4). Display informative dark grey sans-serif text (#343C45). The top text block is left-aligned, followed by two bullet-point style paragraphs slightly indented. A concluding text block is positioned at the bottom-right, maintaining a modern, readable typography.

slides.composition: Minimalist, text-heavy slide with a main title at the top, followed by a numbered list of benefits, each with a bold heading and a descriptive paragraph, all left-aligned on a plain background.
slides.subject: Benefits of hot and cold therapy/duo
slides.textOverlay:
The Benefits of the Hot & Cold Duo

1 Manages Stress Response
Cold plunges boost dopamine, alertness, and resilience. Saunas lower cortisol and release endorphins, training your body to better manage daily stress.

2 Promotes Better Sleep
Cold immersion improves deep slow-wave sleep, while saunas mimic the body’s natural cooling cycle. Together supporting faster sleep onset and better recovery.

3 Boosts Heart Health
Cold plunges burn fat, reduce LDL cholesterol, and strengthen metabolism. Saunas mimic exercise, improving circulation, lowering cholesterol, and reducing cardiovascular risk.

slides.subject: The link between hot and cold therapies (cold plunges and saunas) and longevity, supported by research findings.
slides.textOverlay:
Are hot + cold therapies linked to longevity?

Cold plunges
Early animal studies show up to a 20% increase in lifespan with slight reductions in core body temperature.

Saunas
Robust human research shows a 40% lower risk of premature death in frequent sauna users, plus reduced risk of cardiovascular events.

Together, heat + cold may be powerful allies in extending health span.
slides.mood: Informative, clean, factual, educational, slightly hopeful.

The layout includes a central question, followed by two sections with bolded headings 'Cold plunges' and 'Saunas' describing research findings on longevity and health benefits. slides.composition: Minimalist text-based layout with a title at the top, two main sections with bulleted details, and a concluding explanatory paragraph at the bottom. Text is left-aligned.
slides.subject: Instructions for sauna and cold plunge practice and their health benefits
slides.textOverlay:
How to Practice

Saunas:
1 hour per week
(split across 2-3 sessions)
176-212°F (80-100°C)

Cold Plunge:
11 minutes per week
(split across 2-3 sessions)
2-5 minute sessions at 50-59°F (10-15°C)

Using both in conjunction harnesses their synergistic effects.
The contrasting temperatures creates a "vascular pump" -
saunas dilate your blood vessels while cold plunges constrict
them, improving circulation & heart health.

caption:
GLP-1s are changing more than just your They do more than suppress your appetite and lower blood sugar. They send ripple effects through your kidneys, liver, pancreas, cholesterol, nutrient levels, and thyroid.

These shifts are quietly impacting your long-term health if you’re not watching or tracking them carefully. While your scale can’t tell you if your liver enzymes are rising, or if you’re losing muscle, or if your nutrient stores are depleting — your bloodwork can.

Monitor the full-body effects of GLP-1 with advanced biomarker testing.

primary.hookSignal: O macro hiper-realista da pálpebra fechada com brilho oleoso e poros nítidos ocupa todo o quadro. Em seguida, o título serifado “Your body’s on GLP-1.” em branco no terço inferior fixa o olhar pelo contraste sobre a pele quente.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial macro cinematográfica em close-up extremo, ângulo lateral ~15°, mostrando a região do olho fechado de uma pessoa com a pele contraída, sobrancelha espessa no terço superior e cílios pressionados, criando dobras e brilho tátil. Sujeito principal: pele morena-clara com poros visíveis e micro-texturas, ~30-45 anos, pálpebra cerrada em expressão de esforço/contração; narrativa: macro sensorial que conecta GLP‑1 ao corpo inteiro. Iluminação: key light soft 45° à esquerda, 4400K, intensidade ~70%, softbox 18" com difusão dupla; fill mínimo 10% por bounce branco à direita; negative fill com flag preto abaixo para aumentar contraste; sombras suaves, highlight especular controlado na maçã do rosto. Paleta: pêssego #F1C7A3 → bronze #B97E60 → mocha #6B4636 → marrom-espresso dos pelos #2B1E16; sombras profundas com blacks levemente elevados #1C1511; tipografia em branco puro #FFFFFF. Grading: look Kodak Portra, saturação -10%, contrastes orgânicos, blacks lift 6%, subexposição -0.2 EV. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, micro-contraste +8, sharpening moderado, vignetting -8, sem HDR. Composição: sobrancelha ocupa a faixa superior; pálpebra e rugas diagonais cruzam o centro-direita; espaço negativo controlado no terço inferior-central para tipografia; fundo é a própria pele desfocando suavemente nos cantos. Camera position context: full-frame 45MP, lente macro 100mm, f/8, 1/160s, ISO 100, tripé, captura tethered. Texto/overlay: 1) "Mito" — top-center, fonte SF Pro Display Medium, peso Medium, cor #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 100%, tamanho sm. 2) "Your body’s on GLP-1." — bottom-third center, fonte Georgia Bold, peso Bold, cor #FFFFFF, tracking -1%, line-height 110%, tamanho xl. 3) "So is your liver, thyroid, kidneys, pancreas, & cholesterol." — abaixo do título (bottom-center), fonte Inter Regular, peso Regular, cor #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 130%, tamanho md. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone ou shape; apenas safe margins de 6% nas bordas, sem sombras em texto. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, sensorial, tátil, contemplativo. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia limpa); Aesop skincare macro editorial; Calvin Klein minimal. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores vibrantes/neon; Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar blur artificial pesado; Não usar fontes display ornamentadas; Não inserir molduras. Style summary: realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nítido, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial macro close-up, slight 15° side angle, showing a tightly closed eye area: thick eyebrow across top, eyelashes pressed, skin folds and glossy highlights. Subject: light‑tan skin with visible pores, tactile micro-texture; sensory macro linking GLP‑1 to whole‑body effects. Lighting: soft key 45° left, 4400K, ~70% power, 18" softbox with double diffusion; minimal white bounce fill 10% right; negative fill with black flag below; soft shadows, controlled specular on cheek. Palette: peach #F1C7A3 → bronze #B97E60 → mocha #6B4636 → hair espresso #2B1E16; lifted blacks #1C1511; typography white #FFFFFF. Film grade: Kodak‑Portra feel, saturation -10%, lifted blacks 6%, -0.2 EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 6%, micro‑contrast +8, moderate sharpening, vignette -8. Composition: eyebrow top band; eyelid and wrinkles diagonal mid-right; negative space bottom-center for type. Camera: full‑frame 45MP, 100mm macro, f/8, 1/160s, ISO100, tripod, tethered. Text overlays: 1) “Mito” top-center, SF Pro Display Medium, white #FFFFFF, size sm. 2) “Your body’s on GLP-1.” bottom-third center, Georgia Bold, white, size xl. 3) “So is your liver, thyroid, kidneys, pancreas, & cholesterol.” bottom-center, Inter Regular, white, size md. No icons or shapes. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, tactile. References: Apple keynote, Aesop, Calvin Klein. Avoid neon, medical icons, heavy blur, ornate type, frames. Keep photorealistic, subtle grain, high-res, minimal.
primary.artDirection: Direção: construir um macro sensorial premium. Paleta quente e tátil: pêssego #F1C7A3, bronze #B97E60, mocha #6B4636, espresso #2B1E16, texto #FFFFFF. Grading Portra: saturação -10%, blacks lift 6%, leve subexposição -0.2 EV, vignette -8. Tipografia: wordmark “Mito” em SF Pro Display Medium branco (sm, tracking 0). Headline “Your body’s on GLP-1.” em Georgia Bold branco (xl, tracking -1%, LH 110%). Subcopy “So is your liver, thyroid, kidneys, pancreas, & cholesterol.” em Inter Regular branco (md, LH 130%). Composição: sobrancelha no topo; pálpebra comprimida no centro-direita; reservar espaço negativo no bottom-center para textos. Iluminação: soft key 45° esquerda 4400K com softbox 18"; bounce mínimo à direita; negative fill para recorte; manter highlights especulares controlados. Anti‑padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos; não introduzir cores neon ou gradientes vistosos; não aplicar blur artificial/skin smoothing. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica e clareza), Aesop macro editorial (textura de pele, luxo discreto). Vibe: luxury wellness científico, tátil e minimalista com foco absoluto na pele e no título.

slides.textOverlay:
Everyone talks about GLP-1s for weight loss and blood sugar.
But when one number changes, so do six others.

Kidney function.
Liver fat & inflammation.
Pancreas workload.
Cholesterol & lipid profile.
Nutrient absorption.
Thyroid balance.

They're all shifting.

slides.subject: Abstract biological representation of molecular chains or cellular structures related to GLP-1, accompanying explanatory text.
slides.textOverlay:
Your gut makes a natural hormone called GLP-1.
It helps control blood sugar and appetite by:

1 Triggering insulin from the pancreas after meals
2 Blocking glucagon, which raises blood sugar
3 Slowing digestion, so glucose enters your
  bloodstream more gradually
4 Signaling fullness to your brain via the vagus
  nerve

GLP-1 drugs mimic these effects, which explains
their initial appeal.
slides.style: Abstract, scientific illustration, minimalist text overlay, clean.
slides.prompt: An abstract, dark scientific illustration for a GLP-1 explainer slide. The background is a textured, deep olive green. White text overlays the right side, maintaining a clean, informative aesthetic.

slides.composition: The slide features white text presented in two main sections with numbered bullet points, set against a warm gradient background. The text is left-aligned and centrally placed for readability. A transitional sentence connects the two main ideas.
slides.subject: GLP-1s: short-term benefits vs. long-term downsides without lifestyle changes
slides.textOverlay:
GLP-1s can help in the short term:
1 Lowering blood sugar and A1c
2 Reducing appetite
3 Supporting rapid weight loss
But without lifestyle changes, these benefits are often temporary.
Long-term use can have downsides you won't see on a scale:
1 Worsened insulin resistance if diet isn't addressed
2 Weight regain after stopping (often with more fat, less muscle)
3 Loss of lean muscle mass which slowers metabolism
4 Digestive distress (nausea, vomiting, constipation)
5 Possible nutrient depletion from slower digestion
slides.style: Minimalist, professional, text-centric, clean design
slides.hookSignal: The contrast between 'short term' benefits and 'long-term downsides you won't see on a scale' acts as a hook, prompting the reader to understand the full picture beyond initial observations.

Catching these early means adjusting before
problems develop.

caption:
The sport you choose now could change your lifespan by nearly a decade. A 2025 study in GeroScience analyzed 95,210 elite athletes from 44 sports across 183 countries, comparing their lifespans.

Findings show that these sports are linked to adding 5-8+ years to your lifespan: pole vaulting, gymnastics, and fencing.

While the biggest drops in lifespan were tied to the following sports: sumo, volleyball, and mountaineering.

The best “longevity sport” isn’t just a single activity. It’s a combination that blends endurance, strength, coordination, and flexibility that will give you the best return on longevity.
hookLine: The sport you choose now could change your lifespan by nearly a decade. A 2025 study in GeroScience analyzed 95,210 elite athletes from 44 sports across 183 countries, comparing their lifespans.

primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica com câmera na altura do joelho, panning lateral, mostrando duas pessoas correndo em pista urbana com foco nas pernas e tênis, motion blur dinâmico e tipografia central hero. Sujeito principal: dois corredores anônimos, ~20-35 anos, apenas metade inferior do corpo enquadrada; perna esquerda (short preto) entra pelo terço esquerdo; perna direita (short branco) entra pelo terço direito; ambos com tênis brancos com detalhe verde. Iluminação golden hour lateral a 45° vinda da direita, 4900K, intensidade média-alta, sombras longas e suaves no asfalto, rim light quente destacando panturrilhas. Paleta: pele pêssego #F1C4A8 → âmbar suave #E3A977; asfalto cinza quente #8E857D → borda #B8B1A9; vegetação verde-escuro desfocado #1F3A2D; branco creme do texto #F5F2E8; destaque sage #9CBF87; micro-sombra em #0E0E0E a 15%; grading com blacks levemente elevados e contraste suave (S-curve). Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 6%, leve halation em altas-luzes, blur de movimento orgânico (shutter 1/30s), nitidez seletiva nos tênis, subexposição -0.2 EV. Composição: regra dos terços; linha do horizonte (copas) no terço superior; faixa da pista cortando horizontal no terço inferior; tipografia centralizada no mid-frame; espaço negativo escuro atrás das pernas para legibilidade. Camera position context: 85mm f/2.8, ISO 100, panning em gimbal lateral, distância ~3 m, foco contínuo nos calçados, como still de campanha Equinox. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) Top-center: "Based on a 2025 GeroScience study of 95,210 elite athletes." fonte Inter Regular, cor #EDE7D3, tamanho sm, tracking +2%, line-height 120%. 2) Centro (três linhas): "The Sports That Are" (Times New Roman Regular, cor #F5F2E8, tamanho xl, tracking -1%); "Adding Years to Your" (mesma, com a palavra "Years" em #9CBF87, Semibold, itálico); "Lifespan" (Times New Roman Medium, #F5F2E8). Sombra de texto 10% #000 a 2px blur. ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: sublinhado fino de 1px em #9CBF87 sob "Years" (largura da palavra), nenhum ícone. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, atlético, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide (tipografia e espaçamento), Equinox campaign (atleticismo cinematográfico), Aesop minimal (paleta contida). Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores neon ou saturadas. Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos. Não aplicar glow artificial pesado. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp seletivo, composição minimal e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo, knee-height lateral panning shot of two anonymous runners on an urban path, focusing on legs and white sneakers with green accent; strong motion blur on background, central hero typography. Golden hour side key at 45° from right, 4900K, medium-high intensity, long soft shadows, warm rim light on calves. Palette: skin #F1C4A8/#E3A977, asphalt warm gray #8E857D/#B8B1A9, blurred dark foliage #1F3A2D, text cream #F5F2E8, highlight sage #9CBF87; subtle S-curve, lifted blacks. Texture: 35mm film grain 6%, slight halation, 1/30s motion blur, -0.2 EV, selective sharpness on shoes. Composition: rule-of-thirds; tree line top third, track on lower third; space-negative mid for copy. Camera: 85mm f/2.8, ISO 100, gimbal panning, ~3 m distance. Overlays: top-center small Inter Regular cream line: "Based on a 2025 GeroScience study of 95,210 elite athletes." Center three lines in Times New Roman: line1 "The Sports That Are" cream; line2 "Adding Years to Your" cream with "Years" in sage, semibold italic + 1px underline; line3 "Lifespan" cream. No icons. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, athletic. References: Apple keynote spacing; Equinox campaign. Anti-patterns: no logos, no neon, no generic medical icons, no heavy glow, no ornate display fonts. Keep realistic, subtle film grain, high-res, minimal composition.
primary.artDirection: Paleta contida e quente: pele #F1C4A8/#E3A977, verde-escuro de fundo #1F3A2D, asfalto #8E857D, tipografia creme #F5F2E8 com destaque sage #9CBF87. Tipografia: título serifado Times New Roman (Regular/Medium), corpo auxiliar Inter (Regular). Hierarquia: topo sm Inter em creme; título central em três linhas com "Years" em sage, Semibold itálico e sublinhado de 1px. Sombra suave 10% preto para legibilidade. Fotografia com golden hour lateral 4900K, panning, 85mm f/2.8, 1/30s; grain 6% e blacks levemente elevados. Três anti-padrões críticos: 1) não usar cores vibrantes/neon; 2) não inserir ícones/elementos médicos genéricos; 3) não aplicar glow/gradientes artificiais que pareçam IA. Referências: Apple keynote (espaçamento/calibragem tipográfica) e Equinox campaign (físico cinematográfico). Vibe geral: luxury wellness esportivo e científico, minimal, com energia de performance contida e credibilidade editorial.
