slides.subject: Stress-induced hair shedding (Telogen Effluvium) and its symptoms/causes, illustrated with a man experiencing distress.
slides.textOverlay:
Mito
3
Stress-Induced Shedding
Telogen Effluvium
High stress, illness, surgery, or rapid weight loss can trigger sudden hair shedding—often described as hair "coming out in handfuls."
This condition is common, appearing 2–3 months after the event and is often temporary. Reducing stress and supporting your body with the right nutrients can help restore hair growth.
→

caption:
Ever feel like your digestion’s better when you’re abroad?
You’re not alone—and there’s a reason why.

From hidden additives to everyday exposures, modern life can quietly disrupt your gut. Emulsifiers. Preservatives. Chronic stress. Polluted air. All of it adds up.

Gut symptoms aren’t random. They’re signals:
The first step to feeling better is understanding what’s actually going on inside.

We test over 100+ biomarkers tied to gut health, inflammation, energy, mood and more—so you can stop guessing, and start getting answers.
hookLine: Ever feel like your digestion’s better when you’re abroad?

slides.subject: Wellness picks and practices for a healthy long weekend, with a specific focus on boosting magnesium intake.
slides.textOverlay:
Mito
Today's focus: boost magnesium intake
PM: THIS WEEK
This week, let's focus on magnesium intake levels, common deficiencies, why it's so critical, and how, by adding at least one magnesium-rich food or activity (like taking a magnesium bath or enjoying a moderate amount of nuts and seeds) to your diet, we can make it a consistent practice. Magnesium plays a role in nearly 300 enzyme reactions, from magnesium glycosyltransferase to the enzyme to synthesize protein, bone health, and muscle relaxation.
Add at least two magnesium-rich foods to your meals each day
Aim for 250-350 mg magnesium glycinate before bed
Expect your max. magnesium intake to be in ~

HATCH
Circadian-aligned morning
COWBOY COLOSTRUM
Gut priming for the long weekend
EREWHON
Magnesium-rich greens (per Mito)
PVOLVE
Low-impact sculpt + lymph flow
OURA RING
Tracking recovery & readiness
THERABODY RED LIGHT
Pre-sunlight, pre-cortisol spike
DE SOI
Non-alc unwind before the BBQ

primary.hookSignal: O headline “Cortisol + B12 + Ferritin” em branco puro #FFFFFF, grande e compacto, pairando nítido sobre um fundo bokeh quente e desfocado, cria contraste extremo que trava o scroll imediatamente. O círculo com seta no canto inferior direito sinaliza ação e completa o look de keynote premium.
primary.prompt:
Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um still life macro de cápsulas/comprimidos fora de foco formando manchas orgânicas suaves em tom quente como pano de fundo para tipografia clínica. Sujeito principal: fundo abstrato de pílulas desfocadas (sem marcas), círculos e ovais bokeh sobrepostos sugerindo saúde e bioquímica; zero objetos nítidos, apenas campo cromático suave que reforça o texto hero. Iluminação: softbox difuso 4000K, intensidade baixa-média, sem hotspots; fill suave 10% à direita; vinheta sutil; sombras amplas e macias. Paleta: pêssego #F5C99B → coral #E36A4F → terracotta #B74635, com acentos ameixa #6C3849 e aubergine #2A0F14; tipografia em branco puro #FFFFFF e cinza-nevoa #E7E7E7; color grading com blacks levemente levantados (+8), highlights reduzidos (-10), subexposto -0.2 EV. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, blur cinematográfico orgânico forte (defocus total do fundo), leve bloom 6%, chromatic aberration 1px nas bordas, sem banding. Composição: regra dos terços; tipografia alinhada à esquerda ocupando terço médio; logotipo textual “Mito” pequeno no topo-esquerda; headline em centro-esquerda; subtítulo no bottom-left; call to action discreto bottom-right; foreground é apenas texto nítido; background abstrato desfocado ocupa todo o quadro. Camera position context: captura como se por câmera full-frame em tripé, 85mm f/1.4, ISO 200, 1/250, shallow DOF extremo; pós em Lightroom/DaVinci. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” (top-left), fonte Inter Medium, cor #FFFFFF, tracking +2, line-height 100%, tamanho sm. 2) “|  The Fatigue Trifecta” (top-left, logo abaixo), Inter Regular, #E7E7E7, tracking +10, line-height 110%, tamanho sm; barra vertical separadora #FFFFFF a 60% opacidade, 1.5px. 3) “Cortisol + B12 +
Ferritin” (mid-left), Inter Bold, #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 92%, tamanho xl; quebra de linha antes de “Ferritin”. 4) “Brain fog? Fatigue? Burnout?” (bottom-left), Inter Regular, #E7E7E7, tracking +4, line-height 120%, tamanho md. 5) “Your biomarkers already know why” (bottom-left, abaixo do anterior), Inter Semibold, #FFFFFF, tracking +2, line-height 110%, tamanho lg. 6) Ícone seta→ dentro de círculo (bottom-right): círculo 28px, stroke #FFFFFF 1.5px, seta #FFFFFF; função: avanço do carrossel. Elementos gráficos: gradient overlay radial translúcido #2A0F14 a 20% no canto inferior para contraste; micro-grid invisível para alinhamento; sem bordas de cards. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple Keynote slide, Aesop minimal product, Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores neon saturadas; não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos; não aplicar drop shadows pesados; não usar fontes display ornamentadas; não centralizar todo o texto. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp nas letras, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial photo seen from above (top-down), showing an abstract macro still life of defocused pills forming soft organic bokeh as warm backdrop for clinical typography. Lighting: diffuse softbox 4000K, low–medium intensity, gentle vignette, broad soft shadows. Palette: peach #F5C99B → coral #E36A4F → terracotta #B74635 with plum #6C3849 and aubergine #2A0F14; type in white #FFFFFF and fog-gray #E7E7E7. Grading: lifted blacks (+8), lowered highlights (-10), -0.2 EV. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, strong cinematic defocus, mild bloom 6%, 1px chromatic aberration. Composition: rule-of-thirds; left-aligned type; text is the only sharp element; abstract background fills frame. Camera: full-frame on tripod, 85mm f/1.4, ISO 200, 1/250, extreme shallow DOF; post in Lightroom/DaVinci. Overlays: top-left “Mito” (Inter Medium, white); below: “|  The Fatigue Trifecta” (Inter Regular, gray, vertical bar 1.5px, 60% white). Mid-left hero: “Cortisol + B12 + Ferritin” (Inter Bold, white, line break before “Ferritin”). Bottom-left: “Brain fog? Fatigue? Burnout?” (Inter Regular, gray). Below: “Your biomarkers already know why” (Inter Semibold, white). Bottom-right: circular arrow icon, 28px, white stroke 1.5px. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific. References: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal, Equinox campaign. Avoid neon, generic medical icons, heavy shadows, ornate fonts, centered text.
primary.artDirection: Recrie um slide editorial minimal. Paleta quente desfocada: pêssego #F5C99B, coral #E36A4F, terracotta #B74635, ameixa #6C3849, aubergine #2A0F14; textos em #FFFFFF e apoio em #E7E7E7. Fundo deve ser macro de cápsulas/comprimidos totalmente fora de foco (bokeh orgânico). Tipografia: Inter; logo “Mito” em Inter Medium; linha “The Fatigue Trifecta” em Inter Regular com barra vertical 1.5px; headline “Cortisol + B12 + Ferritin” em Inter Bold com quebra antes de “Ferritin”; subtítulo em Regular; frase-CTA em Semibold. Tracking contido (+0 a +4), line-height 100–120%. Aplique grain 5%, bloom leve e vinheta sutil. Coloque ícone seta→ em círculo 28px no bottom-right (stroke branco 1.5px). Três anti-padrões críticos: evitar cores neon/saturadas; não usar ícones médicos genéricos ou pictogramas de DNA; não aplicar sombras/drops pesados. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica, espaçamento) e Aesop (sofisticação minimal). Vibe: luxury wellness clínico, calmo e científico com foco absoluto na tipografia.

primary.mood: Sentimental, appreciative, nostalgic, loving, and reflective, evoking warmth and gratitude towards a father figure.
primary.style: Modern, clean, and minimalist, utilizing a dark, blurred background with crisp white text overlays in a structured yet organic arrangement.
primary.hookSignal: A nuvem de pills brancas em uppercase — "PAID ATTENTION", "SHOWED UP" — flutuando no centro sobre o pai e o filho desfocados cria contraste imediato e leitura escaneável. O grid de cápsulas com stroke suave recorta o fundo escuro e prende o olhar em micro-recompensas emocionais.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de trás, ângulo levemente baixo (eye-level -10°), mostrando um pai ~40 anos carregando o filho ~5 anos nos ombros, ambos com braços erguidos, desfocados para servir de fundo emocional aos callouts. Sujeito principal: pai pele morena clara, cabelo curto escuro, moletom azul-marinho texturizado; criança com camiseta cinza-claro; rostos voltados para longe, sem identificação, bokeh pronunciado. Iluminação: golden hour com key a 45° à esquerda, 5600K, intensidade média-alta; rim light quente nas silhuetas; fill suave 15% à direita; sombras macias, flare sutil no topo esquerdo. Paleta: charcoal #0E1116, navy denim #203A55, slate #3A4C5E, skin-warm #D8A98B, amber highlight #E9B47A, branco suave #F2F5F7; film grading subexposto -0.3EV, blacks levemente liftados, sombras teal #1C3B48, highlights quentes #F5C184. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, leve halation, vignette -12, blur orgânico do background; texto vetorial ultra-nítido. Composição: pai central no terço inferior; cabeça do filho no terço superior central; grande negative space no topo e laterais para distribuir 14 cápsulas de texto em grid irregular; foreground sem elementos; background suave e contínuo. Camera position: 85mm f/2.0 shallow DOF, handheld estável, ISO 200, 1/500s, look Portra 400. Texto/overlay (especificações para todas as cápsulas: fonte Inter, peso Medium, cor #EAF0F6, tracking +80, line-height 100%, tamanho md, sem animação): 1) "PAID ATTENTION" (top-center). 2) "SHOWED UP" (top-right). 3) "MADE TIME" (upper-left-mid). 4) "STAYED UP" (upper-mid). 5) "LISTENED" (mid-left). 6) "KEPT GOING" (mid-center). 7) "CHEERED" (mid-right). 8) "WAITED IN THE CAR" (lower-mid-left). 9) "PACKED LUNCHES" (lower-mid-right). 10) "SACRIFICED" (bottom-left). 11) "SAID \"IM PROUD OF YOU\"" (bottom-center). 12) "STOOD TALL" (bottom-right). 13) "FIXED IT" (bottom-far-left). 14) "SAVED THE LAST BITE" (bottom-mid-right). Elementos gráficos: cada callout em pill rounded (raio 999px), stroke 1.5px #FFFFFF a 56% opacidade, fill #0A0D12 a 22% com backdrop-blur 6px; duas cápsulas vazias decorativas (top-left e left-mid-bottom). Mood: clean, premium, editorial, emocional, contemplativo, masculino, minimal, suave, confiável, humano. Referências: Apple keynote slide (hierarquia e cápsulas), Equinox campaign (contraste atlético e backlight), Aesop minimal (paleta contida), Calvin Klein editorial (sobriedade). Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos. Não HDR exagerado. Não efeitos 3D/IA aparentes. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nitidez do texto, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post. Cinematic editorial photo from behind, slight low angle, father (~40) carrying son (~5) on shoulders, both arms raised; faces turned away, intentionally out of focus to serve as emotive backdrop. Golden hour: key 45° left at 5600K, medium-high intensity, warm rim light, 15% soft fill right, gentle shadows, subtle flare. Palette: charcoal #0E1116, navy denim #203A55, slate #3A4C5E, skin-warm #D8A98B, highlights #E9B47A/#F5C184, soft white #F2F5F7. Film grade -0.3EV, lifted blacks, teal shadows #1C3B48, warm highlights; 35mm film grain 5%, mild halation, vignette -12; background bokeh, vector-sharp overlays. Composition: father centered lower third; kid in upper third center; generous negative space for 14 pill callouts in an irregular grid. Camera: 85mm f/2.0, shallow DOF, handheld, ISO 200, 1/500s, Portra 400 look. Overlays: Inter Medium, uppercase, color #EAF0F6, tracking +80, LH 100%, size md. Pills: rounded 999px, 1.5px stroke #FFFFFF at 56% opacity, fill #0A0D12 at 22%, backdrop-blur 6px. Texts positioned: PAID ATTENTION (top-center), SHOWED UP (top-right), MADE TIME (upper-left-mid), STAYED UP (upper-mid), LISTENED (mid-left), KEPT GOING (mid-center), CHEERED (mid-right), WAITED IN THE CAR (lower-mid-left), PACKED LUNCHES (lower-mid-right), SACRIFICED (bottom-left), SAID "IM PROUD OF YOU" (bottom-center), STOOD TALL (bottom-right), FIXED IT (bottom-far-left), SAVED THE LAST BITE (bottom-mid-right). Premium, minimal, human; Apple keynote x Equinox vibe.
primary.artDirection: Paleta contida e quente-fria: fundo charcoal #0E1116 com navy #203A55 e slate #3A4C5E; pele aquecida #D8A98B; destaques dourados #F5C184; tipografia e traços em branco suave #EAF0F6. Tipografia: Inter (ou SF Pro como fallback). Overlays em Inter Medium/Bold uppercase; cor #EAF0F6 90%; tracking +80; line-height 100%. Pills: rounded 999px, stroke 1.5px #FFFFFF a 56% opacidade; fill #0A0D12 22%; backdrop-blur 6px; sombra suave 0,12,24 #000 20%. Três anti‑padrões críticos: 1) Nada de logos nem CTA gritante. 2) Evitar cores saturadas e gradientes neon. 3) Proibir ícones médicos/estetizados que quebrem o tom humano. Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia limpa, contraste legível) e Equinox campaign (backlight quente, força emocional). Vibe geral: “premium, minimal e profundamente humano”, com foto backlit em shallow DOF e texto em cápsulas distribuído como constelação emocional sobre o momento pai‑filho.

caption:
Struggling with high cholesterol? You might not need another prescription — you might just need more fiber.

Soluble fibers help trap and flush out excess cholesterol before it gets reabsorbed. That means improving key markers like:

Total cholesterol
LDL (“bad”) cholesterol
ApoB (a major driver of heart risk)

Learn which foods can help — and why testing your biomarkers first can make all the difference.

Take control of your cholesterol without guessing with 100+ biomarkers. Real data. Personalized care.
hookLine: Struggling with high cholesterol? You might not need another prescription — you might just need more fiber.

primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um fundo orgânico desfocado em tons terracotta com tipografia minimalista em destaque. Sujeito principal: campo de cor suave, tipo bokeh de superfície cerâmica fosca, com narrativa de saúde premium da Mito Health — sem pessoas, foco no texto-gancho e no CTA discreto (seta em círculo). Iluminação: key difusa ampla a 3800K (40%), fill suave 20% à esquerda, rim light quente 10% vindo do canto superior direito criando halation leve e gradiente direcional; sombras macias, sem hotspots. Paleta exata: terracotta #B74635 → burnt sienna #B45A30 → caramelo #A76B43 → warm taupe #B89C88 → beige smoke #CDB8A7; texto off-white #F4F2EF; acento mint #BFE6D2; traço do ícone #E9E1D8. Film grading: ligeiramente subexposto (-0.2EV), blacks lifted (+8%), contraste baixo, curva S suave. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, halation quente 6%, blur orgânico 15% no background, vignette -8%, sem banding. Composição: rule-of-thirds; grande negative space; logotipo tipográfico “Mito” sutil no terço superior esquerdo; headline ocupando o terço inferior-esquerdo; subhead logo abaixo; ícone seta em círculo no canto inferior direito; nada no centro para respirar. Camera position context: full-frame 85mm f/2.0, shallow DOF, ISO 200, shutter 1/200, tripod estável, como se capturada em estúdio sobre placa cerâmica. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” — top-left, SF Pro Text Medium, cor #F4F2EF, tracking 0, line-height 100%, tamanho sm. 2) “Struggling with high cholesterol?” — left-bottom-third, Inter SemiBold, cor #FFFFFF, tracking -1, line-height 110%, tamanho xl. 3) “You might just need more fiber — not more meds.” — abaixo do headline, Inter Regular, cor #F4F2EF; palavra “more fiber” em Inter Medium cor #BFE6D2; trecho “— not more meds.” em Inter Italic cor #E2D9CF; tracking 0, line-height 120%, tamanho md. ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: ícone seta fina dentro de círculo 2px, diâmetro 56px, stroke #E9E1D8, sem fill, canto inferior direito com offset de 48px, leve drop shadow 8% blur 6px. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, calmo, confiável, minimalista, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal product, Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos. Não usar sombras pesadas ou glow forte. Não criar aparência de IA/glitch. Não inserir fotos de pessoas. STYLE SUMMARY: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução 4K, sharp controlado, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram slide, cinematic editorial top-down shot of an abstract terracotta bokeh background with minimalist typography as hero. Lighting: broad soft key at 3800K (40%), gentle left fill (20%), warm rim from top-right (10%) for subtle halation; soft shadows, no hotspots. Palette: terracotta #B74635 → burnt sienna #B45A30 → caramel #A76B43 → warm taupe #B89C88 → beige smoke #CDB8A7; text off-white #F4F2EF; mint accent #BFE6D2; icon stroke #E9E1D8. Film grade: -0.2EV, lifted blacks +8%, low contrast, soft S-curve. Texture: 35mm grain 5%, warm halation 6%, organic blur 15%, vignette -8%. Composition: rule-of-thirds, large negative space; “Mito” small top-left; headline big on lower-left; subhead beneath; circular arrow icon bottom-right. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/2.0, shallow DOF, ISO200, 1/200s, tripod. Overlays: Headline “Struggling with high cholesterol?” Inter SemiBold #FFFFFF (xl). Subhead “You might just need more fiber — not more meds.” Inter Regular off-white; “more fiber” in mint #BFE6D2 (Medium); “— not more meds.” in Italic warm gray #E2D9CF. Icon: 56px circle, 2px stroke #E9E1D8. References: Apple keynote, Aesop minimal. Clean, premium, scientific, minimalist.
primary.artDirection: Fundo abstrato quente com gradiente terracotta #B74635 → #B45A30 → #A76B43 → #B89C88 → #CDB8A7. Tipografia: Inter como primária (Headline: Inter SemiBold branco #FFFFFF; Subhead: Inter Regular off-white #F4F2EF; ênfase “more fiber”: Inter Medium mint #BFE6D2; trecho final em Itálico warm gray #E2D9CF). Marcação “Mito” no topo esquerdo: SF Pro Text Medium #F4F2EF, pequeno. Ícone CTA: círculo 56px, stroke 2px #E9E1D8 com seta fina; sem fill. Iluminação/grade: 3800K, baixo contraste, blacks lifted +8%, -0.2EV, grain 35mm 5%, halation leve, vignette discreto. Três anti-padrões críticos: evitar cores saturadas vibrantes; nada de ícones médicos genéricos (seringa, coração); zero sombras pesadas/gradientes artificiais de IA. Referências: Apple keynote (tipografia limpa, respiro), Aesop (paleta quente, sofisticação minimal). Vibe geral: luxury wellness científico, calmo e editorial com amplo negative space e foco total no copy.

Paleta: céu azul suave #9FC6D9 → #78A9C0, mar teal escuro #2F6E7C, pele pêssego neutro #D7A485 com highlights #E8BFA7, roupa branco off #F7F7F5, texto branco puro #FFFFFF; grade com leve teal–orange, blacks levemente lifted, -0.2 subexposição. Textura: grain de filme 35mm 5%, micro-contraste baixo, bloom sutil nas altas, vignette radial suave 18% em #0B0D0F a 28% por trás do título, blur atmosférico orgânico no fundo (shallow DOF). Composição: sujeito ocupa terço esquerdo-médio; cabeça no terço superior, corte do quadro na metade da coxa; horizonte no terço inferior; grande espaço negativo de céu no centro-direita para tipografia; foreground limpo, background mar/céu desfocados. Camera position context: mirrorless full-frame, 85mm f/2.8, ISO 100, 1/1600s, handheld vertical; bokeh cremoso. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) Pill topo-centro levemente acima da cabeça: “Your Longevity Checklist” em Inter Medium, branco #FFFFFF, dentro de cápsula translúcida #0B0D0F a 28% com borda 1px #FFFFFF a 35%, tracking +20, line-height 1.0, tamanho sm. 2) Título centro exato em 3 linhas: “How to Support / Your Body This / 4th of July”; “th” em superscript; Inter Bold, tamanho xl, branco #FFFFFF, tracking 0, line-height 1.1. 3) Subtítulo abaixo do título (bottom-third center): “These small habits will keep your body feeling good during and after the holiday.” com during e after em Italic; Inter Regular, tamanho md, branco #FFFFFF a 90%, tracking +10, line-height 1.3. 4) CTA ícone: círculo outline 2px #FFFFFF, diâmetro md, com seta “→” Inter Medium branco; posicionado logo abaixo do subtítulo (mid-bottom center). ELEMENTOS GRÁFICOS: apenas a cápsula label e o círculo CTA; sem caixas extras. MOOD: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. REFERÊNCIAS: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal product, Equinox campaign. ANTI-PADRÕES: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas. Não adicionar ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar aparência de IA. Não usar fontes display ornamentadas. STYLE SUMMARY: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil de filme, alta resolução, sharp seletivo no sujeito, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram cover, cinematic editorial photo outdoors, eye-level 3/4 side angle. Subject: young woman, medium brown hair in low bun, left profile, white minimal sports bra and white pleated skirt, standing by the sea; wide sky with thin clouds. Golden hour soft light, 45° back-side key from right, 5200K, medium intensity, gentle rim on shoulder/neck; soft shadows. Palette: sky #9FC6D9 → #78A9C0, ocean teal #2F6E7C, skin #D7A485 with highlights #E8BFA7, clothing off-white #F7F7F5, text #FFFFFF; teal–orange grade, slightly lifted blacks, -0.2 underexposed. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, low micro-contrast, subtle bloom, radial vignette 18% in #0B0D0F at 28% behind title, shallow DOF. Composition: subject on left-middle third; head on upper third; horizon on lower third; ample sky negative space center-right for type. Camera: full-frame mirrorless, 85mm f/2.8, ISO100, 1/1600s, handheld vertical. Overlays: top-center translucent pill “Your Longevity Checklist” (Inter Medium, white #FFFFFF, pill fill #0B0D0F 28%, 1px white border 35%). Center title in 3 lines: “How to Support / Your Body This / 4th of July”, “th” superscript (Inter Bold, xl, white). Subtitle below: “These small habits will keep your body feeling good during and after the holiday.” with during/after italic (Inter Regular, md, white 90%). CTA: outlined white circle with arrow → below subtitle. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote, Aesop, Equinox. No logos, no saturated neons, no generic medical icons, no AI look, no ornate display fonts.
primary.artDirection: Recriar capa minimal premium com céu amplo e mar ao fundo, sujeito lateral esquerdo. Paleta: céu #9FC6D9 → #78A9C0; mar #2F6E7C; pele #D7A485/#E8BFA7; roupa #F7F7F5; tipografia branca #FFFFFF com 90% no subtítulo; sombra/vignette #0B0D0F a 28%. Tipografia: Inter (ou SF Pro Display como fallback). Título Inter Bold, tracking 0, line-height 1.1; subtítulo Inter Regular com during/after em Italic; pill Inter Medium com borda branca 1px e fill translúcido; CTA círculo com seta. Críticos anti-padrões: 1) não usar cores vibrantes saturadas; 2) não adicionar logos/ícones extras; 3) não gerar aparência de IA (manter pele natural, grão 35mm 5%). Referências: Apple keynote (hierarquia tipográfica limpa) e Aesop minimal (paleta sóbria, espaço negativo). Vibe: saúde-tech de luxo, calma e intencional, com fotografia realista, luz de golden hour e composição respirada.

caption:

We test your cortisol levels (and 100+ other biomarkers) to get a real picture of what’s going on under the hood. 

Then, we give you a personalized action plan to bring things back into balance — with doctor-backed support every step of the way.

primary.style: Abstract digital art, minimalist typography, modern wellness aesthetic, clean design.
primary.hookSignal: O círculo branco ultrafino recortando o centro do frame, com o título ‘Cortisol’ em branco puro perfeitamente centralizado, contrasta brutalmente com o fundo preto e a figura vermelha desfocada. Esse foco gráfico minimalista cria um alvo visual que dispara o stop-scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica em close 3/4 baixo, mostrando um rosto humano andrógino, cabeça inclinada para trás, interpretado como ‘alarme interno’ do corpo. Sujeito principal: silhueta desfocada com motion blur e long exposure, traços diluídos em tons incandescentes vermelho-alaranjados, expressão tensa e energia inquieta, envelopado por um círculo branco fino que sugere foco laboratorial. Iluminação: key light com gel laranja a 2800K vinda da direita (60% intensidade), fill vermelho carmim a 3000K pela esquerda (35%), leve backlight âmbar (20%) criando halation; sombras profundas e macias, sem hotspots. Paleta: fundo preto carvão #0B0A0A; gradiente do sujeito pêssego queimado #F5A980 → coral incandescente #E36A4F → terracotta #B74635 → rubi #B1322C; branco de texto #FFFFFF; traço do círculo #FFFFFF com 80% opacidade; micro realces âmbar #F6A55A; grading com blacks levemente lifted (#111111), soft contrast, highlight roll-off suave. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 7%, halation sutil, blur orgânico de longa exposição, leve bloom nas altas, subexposição -0.2 EV. Composição: fundo quase sólido escuro ocupando toda a moldura; sujeito centrado ocupando o terço médio, rosto diagonal esquerda→direita; círculo fino (stroke 1.5px) com 86% do menor lado do frame, centrado; safe margins 7% em todos os lados; tipografia centralizada dentro do círculo. Camera position context: full-frame, 85mm f/1.8, 1/8s, ISO 400, handheld estável, shallow DOF; como editorial de estúdio. Texto/Overlays: 1) ‘MITO INSIDER’ (top-center, ligeiramente abaixo do topo do círculo) em Inter Medium, caixa alta, branco #FFFFFF, dentro de pill com borda 1px #FFFFFF 80% opacidade, tracking +40, line-height 110%, tamanho sm; 2) ‘Cortisol’ (center Médio) em Inter Bold, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +10, line-height 100%, tamanho xl; 3) ‘Understanding the “stress hormone” & its impact on your health’ (center abaixo do título) em Inter Regular, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +10, line-height 130%, tamanho md; 4) ícone seta → (bottom-right, margem 4%) em branco #FFFFFF, tamanho sm. Elementos gráficos: círculo de foco (stroke #FFFFFF 80%, sem fill); pill arredondado raio 999px; seta minimal (chevron simples). Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide, Aesop minimal product, Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo; Não usar cores vibrantes neon; Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos; Não aplicar sombras artificiais duras; Não criar aparência de AI. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, sharp controlado, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram post, cinematic editorial close 3/4 low angle, featuring an androgynous blurred face leaning back, evoking the body’s “internal alarm.” Warm gel lighting: key from right at 2800K (60%), red fill from left at 3000K (35%), soft amber backlight (20%), deep soft shadows. Palette: charcoal black bg #0B0A0A; subject gradient peach-burnt #F5A980 → coral #E36A4F → terracotta #B74635 → ruby #B1322C; text white #FFFFFF; ring stroke #FFFFFF at 80% opacity; grading with lifted blacks (#111111), soft contrast, gentle halation. Texture: 35mm film grain 7%, organic long-exposure blur, -0.2 EV, light bloom. Composition: thin white ring (1.5px) at 86% of frame, centered; subject inside mid-third; safe margins 7%; typography centered. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/1.8, 1/8s, ISO 400, handheld, shallow DOF. Overlays: pill label ‘MITO INSIDER’ (Inter Medium, all caps, white, outlined pill 1px, tracking +40, size sm); title ‘Cortisol’ (Inter Bold, white, size xl); subtitle ‘Understanding the “stress hormone” & its impact on your health’ (Inter Regular, white, size md); minimal right-arrow bottom-right (white). Graphics: focus ring, rounded pill, chevron arrow. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, contemplative. References: Apple keynote slide; Aesop minimal. No logos, no neon, no generic medical icons, no harsh shadows, no AI-look. Photorealistic, subtle grain, high-res, minimal and refined.
primary.artDirection: Paleta: fundo preto carvão #0B0A0A; gradientes quentes pêssego #F5A980, coral #E36A4F, terracotta #B74635, rubi #B1322C; texto e traços em branco #FFFFFF (80% opacidade no círculo). Tipografia: Inter — ‘MITO INSIDER’ em Medium all caps dentro de pill outlined; ‘Cortisol’ em Bold (xl); subtítulo em Regular (md). Tracking +10 no corpo e +40 na pill; line-height 130% no subtítulo. Três anti-padrões críticos: não usar ícones médicos clichê, não inserir logos/selos, não saturar com cores neon. Referências: slides da Apple (hierarquia limpa, muito respiro), campanhas Aesop (minimalismo e textura quente). Vibe geral: ciência premium contemplativa — calor orgânico do retrato abstrato em contraste com UI super-clean (círculo e tipografia centrados) que posiciona a peça como luxury wellness/health-tech.

slides.composition: The slide features a black and white image of a person's back, showing their head and shoulders, looking away from the camera. White sans-serif text is overlaid on the left side, starting with a large question, followed by two bullet points explaining the concept. A thin horizontal line separates the two explanatory points. A small white arrow icon is in the bottom right corner, suggesting navigation. The composition is clean and minimalist, with the subject subtly framing the informative text.
slides.subject: Cortisol, the human stress hormone, explained through definitions and its role in the body's fight-or-flight response.
slides.textOverlay:
What is cortisol?

→ Cortisol is your body's primary stress hormone, released by your adrenal glands during stressful situations.

→ It's part of the fight-or-flight response, giving you energy, focus, and alertness when you need it most.
slides.style: Minimalist, Monochromatic, Editorial, Modern, Clean Typography
slides.hookSignal: Direct question 'What is cortisol?' which immediately introduces the main topic and prompts the viewer to learn more.
slides.prompt: A monochromatic, minimalist photo of a person's head and shoulders from behind, looking into a soft, dark gray gradient background. Overlayed on the left side is crisp, white sans-serif text asking 'What is cortisol?' as a large title, with two explanatory bullet points below, separated by a thin horizontal line. A small white arrow icon is in the bottom right corner. Clean, editorial style, with a focus on clear typography and subtle depth.

slides.composition: A high-contrast silhouette of a person (profile view, chest up) is positioned on the left side, looking right. The background is a soft, light grey. White text is overlaid on the right and center of the image, left-aligned. An arrow icon is present at the bottom right.
slides.subject: A silhouetted person in profile from the chest up, looking right.
slides.textOverlay:
Cortisol imbalances are more common than you think.
The good news is that you can manage your cortisol levels and improve your overall health.
Here are some effective stress management strategies, including tips on how to lower cortisol levels:
slides.style: Minimalist, clean, modern, high-contrast, silhouette photography, bold typography
slides.hookSignal: The opening statement 'Cortisol imbalances are more common than you think.' acts as a direct hook by challenging assumptions and creating curiosity, followed by the promise of solutions ('manage your cortisol levels', 'how to lower cortisol levels').

slides.textOverlay:
1
Practice mindfulness &
breathwork

Calm your nervous system with meditation, deep breathing,
and mindfulness. Even 5–10 minutes a day can lower
cortisol and reduce anxiety.
slides.style: Modern, minimalist text overlay on a warm-toned, artistic portrait. Soft lighting, subtle depth of field, and a clean sans-serif typeface.
slides.prompt: A close-up, warm-toned portrait of a person with dark, curly hair, one eye visible and focused, partially obscured by soft lens flares and gentle shadows. The mood is serene and introspective, with rich brown and amber hues. On the left, minimalist white sans-serif text overlays a slightly darker section of the image, including a numbered heading and explanatory paragraphs. A white arrow icon is in the bottom right.

slides.subject: A female tennis player in action on a tennis court, viewed from above.
slides.textOverlay:
2 Move your body daily
Exercise is a powerful cortisol regulator — but intensity matters. Go for moderate movement like walking, strength training, or yoga
→
slides.style: Modern, clean, athletic, editorial, minimalist text overlay.
slides.prompt: Overhead shot of a female tennis player in a white dress on a tennis court, diagonally split by a white line. One side of the court is dark olive green, the other is dark muted teal. The player is in mid-action, holding a green-strung racket, casting a long shadow. Bright, natural daylight. Clean, modern, athletic, editorial photography.

slides.composition: A fit woman in athletic wear is shown in a mid-shot, drinking from a water bottle, with text overlaid on the image. The background is a blurred, dimly lit concrete structure.
slides.subject: A fit woman drinking from a water bottle in an athletic setting.
slides.textOverlay:
3
Eat to support hormone balance
Cortisol spikes with sugar, processed foods, and excessive caffeine. Focus on whole foods: lean protein, healthy fats, and fiber-rich carbs.
slides.style: Lifestyle photography, modern, clean typography, soft lighting, slightly desaturated.

She is drinking from a clear water bottle filled with a pink liquid. The setting is a dimly lit, modern concrete underpass or parking garage, with a blurred background. Soft, natural side lighting illuminates her face and upper body. Realistic, cinematic, slightly desaturated colors, portrait orientation.

slides.composition: A tranquil, slightly elevated shot of a person sleeping face down on crisp white bedding, with dark hair spread on the pillow and one arm gently raised. slides.subject: Person sleeping in a bed with natural sunlight
slides.textOverlay:
4 Prioritize quality sleep
Sleep and cortisol are tightly connected. Aim for 7–9 hours per night, with consistent bed and wake times.

slides.textOverlay:
5
Limit Stimulants & Alcohol
Too much caffeine or alcohol can disrupt your cortisol rhythm. Try cutting back — especially in the afternoon and evening.

caption:
Feeling tired, foggy, or just... off?
 It might not be stress. Or sleep. Or your third cup of coffee. It could be your biomarkers.

⚡️ Low thyroid function ⚡️ High inflammation ⚡️ Poor metabolic health ⚡️ Vitamin D deficiency

These are just a few lab markers that can explain how you’re feeling—and what to do about it.

Mito tests 100+ biomarkers and pairs your results with a 1:1 doctor consult and personalized plan.

Because guessing doesn’t fix fatigue. Data does.
hookLine: Feeling tired, foggy, or just... off?

primary.composition: Minimalist design with large white text centered on a vertical gradient background. The text is broken into multiple lines for readability, with a main question and a secondary, slightly smaller informative line.
primary.subject: Understanding potential causes for common symptoms like fatigue and brain fog, specifically suggesting lab tests.
primary.textOverlay:
Feeling tired,
foggy, or off
lately?

It could be your labs—here's what to check →
primary.style: Minimalist, clean, modern, gradient background, typography-focused.
primary.hookSignal: A frase enorme em branco frio — “Feeling tired, foggy, or off lately?” — ancorada no bottom-left, contrasta violentamente contra o degradê azul–teal e o vasto espaço negativo à direita, gerando stop‑scroll imediato.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, cartaz tipográfico editorial minimalista visto de frente, ângulo reto 0°, mostrando um fundo em degradê azul–teal com headline grande no terço inferior esquerdo. Sujeito principal: a própria tipografia como protagonista — headline em Inter/SF Pro Display sem serifa, peso Semibold, letras brancas impecáveis, chamando: “Feeling tired, foggy, or off lately?” com subhead discreto abaixo: “It could be your labs—here’s what to check →”. Iluminação: ambient soft uniforme, 6500K, intensidade baixa, leve falloff diagonal da esquerda para a direita; vinheta sutil 6% nas bordas; sem sombras projetadas. Paleta: degradê horizontal puxa de teal #4CB7AE → azulado #4C8EC4 → deep periwinkle #3F6FB7; texto principal branco frio #F6FAFF; subhead cinza-azulado #D6E5F0; vinheta azul-escura #173A6A a 8% de opacidade; fundo sem pretos puros (blacks lifted). Textura/tratamento: dither noise 2% para evitar banding, grain fino 1%, suavização leve, zero blur no texto, nitidez alta. Composição: área segura 10% em todas as bordas; headline ancorada no bottom-left ocupando ~60% da largura; quebras de linha exatas — L1: “Feeling tired,” L2: “foggy, or off” L3: “lately?”; subhead alinhado à esquerda 24px abaixo, comprimento máximo 42% da largura; grande espaço negativo no lado direito (≈55% do quadro). Camera position context: poster shot frontal, like studio scan; equivalência 50mm, f/5.6, ISO 100, no parallax. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Feeling tired, foggy, or off lately?” — posição bottom-left, fonte Inter/SF Pro Display, Semibold, cor #F6FAFF, tracking -1%, line-height 0.96, tamanho xl; sem animação. 2) “It could be your labs—here’s what to check →” — posição bottom-left abaixo do título, Inter Regular, cor #D6E5F0, tracking 0%, line-height 1.15, tamanho md; seta “→” em #F6FAFF para contraste. Elementos gráficos: nenhum ícone; apenas o degradê contínuo, vinheta suave e grid invisível 12 colunas para alinhamento. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, calmo, confiável, minimalista, sofisticado. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Stripe design system gradients. Anti-padrões: Não adicionar logo. Não usar cores vibrantes saturadas/neon. Não aplicar sombras pesadas ou glow. Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos. Não criar efeitos 3D. Style summary: realismo de poster digital, tipografia nítida, degradê suave com dither, alta resolução 1080×1350, composição minimalista e precisa.
primary.promptEN: Vertical 4:5 Instagram poster, ultra-clean editorial typographic layout, straight-on 0° view. Subject: typography as hero — large Inter/SF Pro Display Semibold white headline reading “Feeling tired, foggy, or off lately?” with a smaller subhead: “It could be your labs—here’s what to check →”. Lighting: soft ambient, 6500K, low intensity, slight left-to-right falloff, subtle vignette 6%, no hard shadows. Palette: horizontal gradient teal #4CB7AE → blue #4C8EC4 → deep periwinkle #3F6FB7; headline white #F6FAFF; subhead blue-grey #D6E5F0; lifted blacks. Texture: dither noise 2% to avoid banding, fine film grain 1%, high sharpness, no blur. Composition: safe margins 10%; headline bottom-left occupying ~60% width; line breaks L1 “Feeling tired,” L2 “foggy, or off” L3 “lately?”; subhead 24px below, max width 42%; large negative space on right (~55%). Camera context: poster scan look, 50mm eq, f/5.6, ISO100. Overlays: headline Inter/SF Pro Display Semibold, #F6FAFF, tracking -1%, LH 0.96, size xl; subhead Inter Regular, #D6E5F0 with arrow “→” in #F6FAFF, tracking 0%, LH 1.15, size md. No icons, no logos. Mood: clean, premium, scientific, minimal, sophisticated. References: Apple keynote slide; Stripe gradients.
primary.artDirection: Recrie um slide-hero tipográfico minimalista. Paleta: degradê horizontal teal #4CB7AE → azul #4C8EC4 → deep periwinkle #3F6FB7; headline branco #F6FAFF; subhead #D6E5F0; vinheta #173A6A a 8% opacidade. Tipografia: Inter (ou SF Pro Display). Headline Semibold, tracking -1%, line-height ~0.96; subhead Regular, tracking 0%, line-height ~1.15. Alinhamento à esquerda, área segura 10%. Headline em três linhas: “Feeling tired,” / “foggy, or off” / “lately?”. Subhead 24px abaixo: “It could be your labs—here’s what to check →”, com a seta em branco #F6FAFF. A textura deve ter dither 2% para evitar banding e grain fino 1%; sem sombras pesadas. Três anti‑padrões críticos: não inserir logos, não usar ícones médicos genéricos, não saturar as cores/neon. Referências: Apple keynote slide; Stripe gradients (simplicidade e rigor tipográfico). Vibe geral: health-tech premium, calmo e confiável, com espaço negativo generoso e precisão suíça no grid.

slides.subject: Thyroid function and TSH levels, including symptoms of imbalance and ways to support thyroid health.
slides.textOverlay:
1 TSH – thyroid function
Optimal: 0.4 – 4.0 mIU/L
The thyroid gland regulates metabolism, energy levels, and overall hormonal balance. Imbalances can lead to hypothyroidism (fatigue, weight gain, depression) or hyperthyroidism (anxiety, weight loss, heart palpitations).
To support thyroid health, focus on improving iodine intake, managing stress, and maintaining a diet rich in selenium, zinc, and healthy fats. You might also consider thyroid-supporting supplements such as ashwagandha and adaptogens.
→

slides.subject: hsCRP, inflammation, cardiovascular health, diet, supplements, medication
slides.textOverlay: 2 hsCRP – the inflammation alarm Optimal: < 1.0 mg/L hsCRP is a leading marker of systemic inflammation and a powerful predictor of cardiovascular disease, dementia, and early death—with an 81% increase in all-cause mortality when elevated. You can lower it through an anti-inflammatory diet, regular exercise, and reducing sugar. Support options include supplements like omega-3s, curcumin, magnesium, and vitamin D, as well as prescriptions such as cholesterol-lowering medications and ASA. →

slides.subject: HbA1c as a metabolic marker and ways to optimize it.
slides.textOverlay:
3 HbA1c – your metabolic clock
Optimal: < 5.2%
A long-term blood sugar marker that reflects your 3-month average glucose levels. When elevated, it's strongly linked to higher risk of mortality, cardiovascular disease, cancer, and dementia.
You can lower it through caloric restriction, regular exercise, and a low-carb, high-fat diet—plus support from supplements like ALA, magnesium, and berberine, or medications such as GLP-1s, Metformin, and SGLT2 inhibitors.

Below, two paragraphs of white text provide detailed information about Vitamin D's benefits and ways to optimize levels. A white right-arrow icon is in the bottom right corner.
slides.subject: Vitamin D and its importance for immune function, brain health, and overall well-being, including methods for optimization.
slides.textOverlay:
4 Vitamin D – the immunity shield
Optimal > 40 ng/mL
Vitamin D plays a key role in supporting immune function, reducing inflammation, aiding calcium absorption, and protecting brain health. Low levels are associated with a 26% increase in all-cause mortality.
To raise your levels, get safe sun exposure and include foods like fish, eggs, and mushrooms. Supplementing with Vitamin D (ideally paired with K2) or using prescribed Vitamin D therapy can also help optimize your levels.
→

slides.composition: text-heavy slide with a main title, a key data point in a shape, and two paragraphs of explanatory text, all against a solid background.
slides.subject: HDL-C (High-density lipoprotein cholesterol) and its health benefits, along with ways to improve its levels.
slides.textOverlay:
5 HDL-C – the cleaner
Optimal > 60 mg/dL

HDL-C, often called the “good cholesterol,” helps remove excess cholesterol, reduce inflammation, support metabolic health, and protect brain function. Low HDL levels are linked to a 49% increase in all-cause mortality.

To raise it, incorporate HIIT and strength training, reduce sugar, and eat more monounsaturated fats, omega-3s, and polyphenol-rich foods like dark chocolate and berries. Supplements such as omega-3s, curcumin, and astaxanthin can help, along with prescriptions like fibrates, statins, and PCSK9 inhibitors.

caption:
Omega-3s are essential—but most people aren’t getting enough. 

They play a critical role in brain function, heart health, inflammation, and more. And yet, even those with a “healthy” diet can have low levels.

The reason? Your body can’t make Omega-3 on its own - and its absorption depends on genetics, lifestyle, gut health, and the type of omega-3 you consume.

The only way to know if you’re getting enough? Test.
With the Mito Core Panel, you can measure your omega-3 levels (and 100+ other biomarkers) to make informed, personalized decisions for your long-term health.
hookLine: Omega-3s are essential—but most people aren’t getting enough.

primary.hookSignal: O olho trava na palavra “wellness” destacada em pêssego #F5B08E dentro da manchete gigante branca, flutuando sobre o fundo quente desfocado. O contraste do card branco minimalista no terço inferior reforça o stop‑scroll.
primary.prompt: Imagem vertical 4:5 para post de Instagram, fotografia editorial cinematográfica vista de cima, ângulo aéreo alto, mostrando um homem adulto (30–40), barba curta, olhar baixo, camiseta branca slim, atrás de uma bancada de madeira clara com frascos de suplementos desfocados no foreground e janela com bokeh quente ao fundo. Sujeito principal: torso em mid-shot, braços relaxados; narrativa de rotina matinal de saúde, contemplando ômega-3. Iluminação: golden hour vindo da janela traseira-esquerda como key a 45°, 4800K, intensidade média-suave; fill bounce frontal 5200K baixo; rim light sutil no ombro direito; sombras suaves caindo para baixo-esquerda. Paleta: mel #E8D3B2 → olive-sage #9FB784 → cinza antracito #1A1D22; card branco #FFFFFF; texto quase-preto #0F1115; cinza secundário #6E7581; destaque pêssego #F5B08E; vidro/transparência #0B0D0F20; sombras #00000026. Grading: levemente subexposto (-0.2EV), blacks lifted 8%, S-curve suave, branco ligeiramente quente. Textura/tratamento: grain de filme 35mm 5%, halation sutil nas altas, bokeh orgânico, vignette suave nas bordas 12%. Composição: regra dos terços; topo-centro “Mito”; abaixo, pill “HEALTH HACKS”; headline grande centralizada levemente à direita; card de artigo ocupa o terço inferior-central; frascos desfocados no bottom foreground; sujeito no mid-background com DOF raso separando camadas. Camera position context: full-frame 85mm f/2.0, shutter 1/200, ISO 200, tripod, shallow DOF, como se capturada em estúdio natural com janela. TEXTO/OVERLAYS: 1) “Mito” (top center), Inter Medium, branco #FFFFFF, tracking +20, tamanho sm, sem sombra. 2) Pill “HEALTH HACKS” (top-center abaixo do logo), all-caps Inter Semibold, #FFFFFF, border 1px #FFFFFF80, bg #0B0D0F20 blur, radius 999, padding 12x20. 3) Headline “Are Omega-3s just another wellness trend?” (mid-upper center-right), Inter ExtraBold, branco #FFFFFF, xl, line-height 110%, tracking 0; a palavra “wellness” em #F5B08E. 4) Card artigo (mid-lower center), retângulo 1160x620px aprox., radius 20px, bg #FFFFFF, sombra 0 12px 32px #00000020: a) “JUN 10, 2025” (top-left interno), Inter Medium, #7A808A, uppercase, tracking +60, tamanho xs; b) Título “Omega-3 Supplements: Do They Actually Do Anything for You?” (top-mid interno), Inter Bold, #0F1115, lg, line-height 118%; c) Subcopy “These popular pills promise heart, brain, and joint benefits—but do omega-3 supplements live up to the hype?” (abaixo do título), Inter Regular, #4C515A, md, line-height 140%; d) Tag pill “Longevity” (abaixo à esquerda), bg #F1F2F4, texto #38404A, Inter Medium, radius 999, padding 8x14; e) “WRITTEN BY” (bottom-left interno) Inter Medium uppercase #9AA0A8 xs; logo-disco 20px preto #0F1115 com “Mito” white ao lado de “Mito Team” Inter Semibold #0F1115. 5) Caption “Here’s what the science actually says” (bottom-center), Inter Medium Italic, #FFFFFFCC, md, com ícone seta → em círculo 24px outline #FFFFFF80 à direita, leve slide-in up 200ms. Elementos gráficos: gradient overlay radial superior #0B0D0F66→transparent, guiding lines invisíveis de grid 12 colunas, spacing 24px; botão/ícone seta é hit-area 36px; sem ícones médicos. Mood: clean, premium, editorial, científico, contemplativo, sofisticado, calor humano. Referências: Apple Keynote slide, Aesop minimal product, Notion-style card, Equinox campaign. Anti-padrões: Não usar cores neon saturadas; não aplicar sombras pesadas ou glows digitais; não usar ícones médicos genéricos; não adicionar emojis; não criar aparência de IA plástica. Style summary: Manter realismo fotográfico, sombras naturais, grão sutil, alta resolução, nitidez controlada, composição minimalista e sofisticada.
primary.promptEN: 4:5 vertical Instagram image, cinematic editorial photo from a slightly high overhead angle, showing an adult man (30–40) in a white tee looking down, behind a light-wood counter with blurred supplement bottles in foreground and a warm window bokeh background. Lighting: golden-hour backlight from window at 45° left (4800K, soft-medium), gentle front bounce (5200K), subtle rim on right shoulder; soft shadows down-left. Palette: honey #E8D3B2, olive-sage #9FB784, near-black #1A1D22, card white #FFFFFF, body text #0F1115, secondary gray #6E7581, accent peach #F5B08E, overlay #0B0D0F20, shadows #00000026. Grade: -0.2EV, lifted blacks 8%, soft S-curve, warm WB. Texture: 35mm film grain 5%, light halation, organic bokeh, 12% vignette. Composition: logo top-center, “HEALTH HACKS” pill below, XXL headline centered slightly right, white article card in lower-middle, caption bottom-center; foreground bottles blurred; subject mid-background; shallow DOF. Camera: full-frame 85mm f/2.0, 1/200, ISO200, tripod. Overlays (Inter): 1) “Mito” (top-center) white; 2) Pill “HEALTH HACKS” all-caps white text, 1px white border, translucent bg, radius 999; 3) Headline “Are Omega-3s just another wellness trend?” white ExtraBold xl, “wellness” colored #F5B08E; 4) Article card with date (caps gray), title (Bold #0F1115), subcopy (Regular #4C515A), “Longevity” tag (chip #F1F2F4/#38404A), byline with small black disc logo; 5) Bottom caption “Here’s what the science actually says” italic #FFFFFFCC with outlined arrow icon. References: Apple Keynote, Aesop, Notion card, Equinox. Avoid neon, heavy shadows, generic medical icons, emojis, AI-looking plastic.
primary.artDirection: Vibe: clean premium editorial-científico com calor humano. Paleta: fundo mel #E8D3B2 e olive-sage #9FB784; overlays em branco #FFFFFF; textos #0F1115 e #6E7581; destaque pêssego #F5B08E; sombras #00000026; overlay translúcido #0B0D0F20. Tipografia: Inter em toda a peça — Headline ExtraBold branca com a palavra “wellness” em #F5B08E; card com título Bold #0F1115, subcopy Regular #4C515A, data Medium uppercase #7A808A tracking amplo; “Mito” Medium branco; caption inferior Medium Italic #FFFFFFCC; botões/pills com radius 999 e border 1px #FFFFFF80. Três anti‑padrões críticos: 1) Não usar cores saturadas/neon ou gradientes chamativos. 2) Não aplicar sombras pesadas, glows e bevels; manter sombra suave e natural. 3) Não inserir ícones médicos genéricos (coração/estetoscópio) nem emojis. Referências: Apple Keynote (hierarquia tipográfica e espaço negativo) e Aesop (minimalismo tátil); como apoio, card no estilo Notion. Direção: foto quente com backlight, DOF raso, sujeito humano desfocado ao fundo; grande headline centrada; card branco com conteúdo editorial; caption sutil com seta. Uma frase de vibe: ciência clara, estética de luxo funcional.
